Name: MEED | Middle East Economic Digest
Description:
Since its founding in 1957, MEED (Middle East Economic Digest) has established itself as the foremost authority in business intelligence for the Middle East and Africa region. As a premium source of insight, MEED delivers strategic, data-driven analysis and business intelligence that helps senior decision-makers navigate one of the world's fastest-growing and most dynamic business regions. 
 
Operating across multiple channels, MEED offers:

- MEED.com: A subscription-based platform that provides up-to-the-minute business news, macroeconomic trends, project developments, and sector analysis. 
- MEED Projects: the region’s most comprehensive projects-tracking database, with multi-sector coverage, forecasts, and detailed historical data, enabling organisations to identify opportunities, anticipate risk, and support robust decision-making. 
- MEED Premium Intelligence Reports: bespoke research and deep-analysis offerings, designed to uncover trends, sector drivers, competitive landscapes, and policy shifts.
- MEED Events: over 30 C-suite conferences, summits, breakfast clubs, roundtables, and awards programmes, designed to bring together business leaders and policy-makers. 

In December 2017, MEED became part of the GlobalData group, enabling it to draw on expanded resources in data, technology, and global insight, while retaining its deep regional expertise.

Name: Hyperbots Inc.
Description:
At Hyperbots, we are on a mission to free up humans from mundane and repetitive tasks in finance. 

Tasks such as invoice processing, 3-way/2-way matching, accruals, capitalization, GL mapping and updates, early payment discount decisions, procurement process intelligence, employee expense management, receivables, collections, collaboration with employees, vendors, and customers, need to be significantly transformed through AI.

This requires secure, accurate, and state-of-the-art finance-specific AI innovations in NLP, Vision, Language Models, Recommenders, Intelligent Document Processing, Data Visualizations, and Conversational Technology domains.
At Hyperbots, we have rooted our research in the above domains to create significant ROI for AI adoption in finance.

We have designed the AI Assistants from the ground up with help from dozens of CFOs of various industries. 

Our AI Assistants for finance are AI-native with inbuilt flexibility to configure them to suit your specific needs with no financing for a custom IT project. Initial trials have demonstrated an 80% reduction in the per-invoice cost of processing due to end-to-end and exhaustive automation. In addition, invoice and expense processing time is slashed from 5-15 days to a few minutes.

Our AI Assistants are ready to deploy, easy to configure and come with inbuilt integrations with widely used ERP, CRM, and other applications.

Name: PFU America, Inc.
Description:
For more than 50 years, the PFU group of companies (“PFU”) has been developing technologies to accelerate digital transformation for organizations around the world—including our state-of-the-art fi Series and ScanSnap document scanners.

PFU Limited was founded in 1960, and our joint-venture roots weave back to 1973 when we joined PANAFACOM, a consortium of companies including Fujitsu and Panasonic that developed the first minicomputers. Years later, in 1987, USAC Denshi and PANAFACOM merged to establish PFU Limited (PANAFACOM, USAC). In 1983, PFU Limited launched its first document scanner.

PFU has been committed to manufacturing and supporting digital transformation-focused products for our customers and partners for decades. From introducing the first flatbed scanner to building the best-selling fi-7160, our innovative spirit and solution-forward technologies have helped us achieve and maintain our top spot as a leader in document scanners.

In 2022, we joined the Ricoh Group of companies and changed our name from Fujitsu Document Scanners to Ricoh Document Scanners. Besides the change in branding, our customers and partners can expect the same level of excellence, quality, and reliability. The R&D, manufacturing, sales, marketing, and services that our customers and partners know and trust will stay exactly the same.

We are dedicated to bringing best-in-class consumer and enterprise document scanners to organizations everywhere, helping them move forward in a more connected, sustainable world.

Description:
Hablla is a conversational marketing platform that revolutionizes how companies communicate with their customers, integrating marketing, sales, and customer service all in one place. With an omnichannel approach, our tool allows you to manage all your interaction channels—such as WhatsApp, email, chat, and social media—within a single interface, providing an integrated and efficient experience for your leads, prospects, and clients.

Hablla's strength lies in its intelligent process automation. Whether for small businesses or large corporations, Hablla is the ultimate choice for those looking to scale their marketing and sales operations with smart automations, omnichannel support, and a unified view of all their processes. Looking ahead, we're focused on forging strategic partnerships with global financial institutions to broaden the impact of our cutting-edge solutions.

Name: Helsinki Geoeconomics Monitor (HeGeMon)
Description:
Helsinki Geoeconomics Monitor (HeGeMon) is the flagship publication and convening framework of the Helsinki Geoeconomics Society (the Helsinki Society), realized in partnership with Springer Nature. At its core stands the Helsinki Manual on Corporate Geoeconomics—the world’s first non-legally binding restatement of the principles and practices of economic security regulation, and a study of best practices and self-regulatory standards for business geopolitics. Through the New Helsinki Process, corporates, investors, and experts co-author the standards that will guide how firms manage risk, seize opportunity, and navigate the competing economic security strategies imposed by states.

As a 𝗼𝗻𝗲-𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗽 𝘀𝗵𝗼𝗽 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗴𝗲𝗼𝗲𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗼𝗺𝗶𝗰 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲, HeGeMon monitors publications, reports, current affairs, and legal and policy developments, and maps emerging trends in law, finance, industry, and strategy. By delivering peer-reviewed analysis, policy commentary, and practical frameworks, it sustains a 𝘆𝗲𝗮𝗿-𝗿𝗼𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗼𝗴𝘂𝗲 at the interface of theory and practice. HeGeMon provides scholarly grounding, global distribution, and institutional framing for professionals in law, finance, risk, and strategy, serving as the central platform through which the Society’s mission continues to advance.

Our mission is clear:

Today, more than 90 schools in Latin America already trust PayMon, and with them, we continue building the future of education and payments. By connecting the entire school community in a single platform, we deliver greater transparency, efficiency, and value for everyone involved.

You will find news, analysis, commentary and expert insights on issues such  as, risk & resilience, investor relations, stakeholder governance, disclosure & reporting, innovation, ESG,  sustainability & climate, culture, reputation, selection & diversity, strategy, finance, technology, executive remuneration, the roles of boards and directors. 

The insight & research programme of Board Agenda is enhanced by experienced board members, as well as investors, governance professionals, economists, academics, politicians and regulators from across the world, with thousands of articles, reports and case studies available on every conceivable issue that boards encounter.

The independent ethos of Board Agenda means that editorial leader articles criticise, challenge or applaud corporate behaviour; there is informed opinion from diverse standpoints on topical business issues, probing interviews with corporate leaders, investigative business reporting, and analysis of corporate failures as well as successes.

The purpose of Board Agenda is to support board executives so they gain insight about issues that impact on corporate governance, acquire specific knowledge about board practices, navigate the increasing complexities of their role, embed best practice in their board activities and help them achieve effective board oversight.

Name: Fusion Analytics
Description:
Today, companies are swimming in data from a variety of sources that do not connected with one another, and some are at their raw level with noise and biases - Data Chaos.

Data is often missing, wrong or conflicting, forcing teams to spend significant time piecing together insights to get a clear picture of business performance. 

Does this sound familiar? Are you encountering similar challenges?

So, how are companies addressing this issue? Many invest millions in hiring experts or consultants, or they simply abandon the data due to lack of trust. 

As a better alternative, Fusion offers a more empowering and cost-effective software solution.

As the Metric Improvement Company, Fusion specializes in transforming data chaos into actionable business intelligence for faster and more confident decision-making.

Over the past 17+ years, Fusion has dedicated its efforts in tackling Data Chaos. What we found the most effective is to start with your key decisions as the guiding light to navigate through the massive data set. By adopting a Decision-Led mindset, we help you identify the right metrics and data sources, eliminating clutter.

Putting the metrics in the right sequence, a decision-driven framework, can help showcase how everything links to your most important decisions. This approach simplifies and accelerates decision-making with greater confidence. 

Applying Fusion's F.U.S.E. Method to: 
Filter out noise, 
Unify sources to get One Version of Metrics, 
Synchronize the story and 
Equalize trends for full comparability. 

Our software allows you to visualize metrics seamlessly. No more data dump dashboards or interruptions in your decision-making process - just clear, actionable insights aligned with your key decisions.

Please send us a DM on what you think. Visit our site or our Linkedin posts for more details on how we transform data.

Name: heat. | News & Intelligence on BioPharmaceutical Pricing & Access
Description:
heat. | Health Evaluations + Applied Therapeutics is an independent informatics service devoted to providing intelligence and coverage on pricing and access to emerging Technologies-in-Health; primarily from a Pharmaceutical and Biotechnology perspective.

We serve as an informatics repository and an expert analysis hub on the global narrative on pricing, value and access to prescription drugs. heat. collects and collates information unavailable through any other single media source, continuously following discussions and debates while seeking to reflect a diverse community of views on issues of international importance.

This page has the following principal aims:

1. Debate on practices and policies pertaining to the valuation and pricing of biopharmaceuticals. 

2. Insights on the assessment and impact of biopharmaceuticals. 

3. Focus on access and affordability.

4. Promote a diversity of voices to ensure a balanced narrative.

5. Maintain a non-partisan environment to engage dialogue amongst healthcare stakeholders.

We want heat. to be a page that all stakeholders feel comfortable in visiting and engaging - to read, comment, and contribute - regardless of perspectives. People might not always “like” what we post, but everyone should feel invited and encouraged to join the discussion, share their opinions, and engage in debate.

heat. is committed to high journalistic standards of documentable evidence and reliable sourcing. This page does not have a single editorial position on specific issues but rather aims to build a diverse online community of views and opinions. Content shared on heat. represents the views of it's authors and does not necessarily represent the opinions of the page or its editors. 

heat. is non-profit, editorial-independent and dedicated to the public interest.

Description:
Campden Family Connect is the first of its kind venture between RAAY – the Amit Patni Family office, Arihant Patni and Campden Wealth, UK in the family office and family business space.

Campden Family Connect is the pre-eminent membership network for India’s ultra-high net worth community, family business owners and their family offices. Campden Family Connect delivers both local and global networking opportunities and access to international best practices in family business, family office and generational education.

The Patni family is pioneer in the field of IT in India and went on to build a global IT outsourcing business spanning over a period of 4 decades. The family has constantly recognized the next wave of innovation, which also led them to become one of the very few to establish the concept of family office in India back in 2006. However, even after years, the concept of family offices in India remains nascent with very few fully owned family offices unlike markets such as UK, US and Europe. To address this scenario, the Patnis have entered into a joint venture with Campden Wealth to set up a premier global membership community for ultra-high net worth families in India.

Campden Wealth, UK is an independent family owned business providing unrivalled knowledge and intelligence to a community of the world's wealthiest families, their family office and ultra-high net worth investors since 1987. Campden Wealth further enhanced its global private wealth arena with the acquisition of the Institute for Private Investors (IPI) - the leading membership of private investors in the United States in 2011. Their global community includes over 1300 family principals from 30 countries.

- What they do.
- Who they are.

"Who they are" - our Audience Insights help understand the demographics, interests, and occupations of people discussing brands and other topics on social media.

Industry experts recognize YouScan as a leading player in the market. Gartner named YouScan a "Cool AI Vendor for Marketing," while the MarkTech Breakthrough Awards several times recognized us as the "Best Social Media Monitoring Software."

Base de datos de Gestores. La razón de ser de Citywire es identificar y seguir la trayectoria individual de cada gestor de fondos.

Citywire sigue estas trayectorias individuales cubriendo todos los fondos que cada gestor gestiona o ha gestionado en el pasado, independientemente de que ejerciera su gestión en otra gestora distinta a la que pertenece en la actualidad. Citywire evalúa el éxito de los gestores de fondos medido por su rentabilidad ajustada al riesgo por cada fondo que gestione en periodos de 36 meses. Las calificaciones se asignan cada mes.

Name: Mukhyamantri Udyamshala Yojana
Description:
The Dept. of Rural Development, Govt of Uttarakhand in 2021 has established two Rural Business Incubators (RBI)  in Almora and Pauri to provide business support services to entrepreneurs to accelerate both establishment of new enterprises and scaling-up of existing enterprises.The objectives of RBIs are to:
1. Promote innovation, entrepreneurship and business creation in sectors that can offer opportunities to rural communities.
2. Create livelihood opportunities for the rural youth within the rural vicinity to address migration in the State.
3. Facilitate evolution of agriculture and non-agriculture based rural enterprise ecosystem.
4. Generate innovative solutions to local and global problems.
The services offered are 
Developing an entrepreneurship mindset, Ideation Support, Business Planning, Compliance and Legal Support, Market Access and Linkages, Mentorship Support, Co-working spaces. 
Our Target Beneficiary are can be anyone from Uttarakhand in these 5 categories
a) Seed Entrepreneurs: Individuals who just have an idea or a thought for business
b) Early-stage Entrepreneurs: Individuals who have registered their business, identified their product or services and  serviced their first clients
c) Growth Stage Entrepreneurs: Individuals who have been in business for some time and have a product that has been tested in the market, looking for scaling operations or  access larger markets and compete with existing/new players in the market.
d) SHG/Federations: Enterprises run by SHG promoted in the state. These may or may not be registered as legal entities but may be running small businesses.
e) Aggregators/Platforms from within or outside the State: Entrepreneurs who may offer opportunities to the rural entrepreneurs by aggregating or by offering them platforms (digital or brick & mortar) to expand their businesses.
Our Programme offered are Long term( 6-9 months), Short term ( 3 months), Boot camps ( 3-5 days), Just In Time (1-2 Days)
rbiuttarakhand@gmail.com

Name: PrecisionPoint
Description:
PrecisionPoint is a leading supplier of BI within the Dynamics ERP space, with over 20 years’ experience in delivering insight to clients of all sizes across the globe.

All of our solutions, whether it be our intelligent data warehouse, or data connection tools, have data and accounting integrity at the heart , ensuring that what many of our customers have coined as ‘penny accuracy’, is delivered throughout your critical business information.

As well as accuracy, ‘automation and simplification’ is also critical in ensuring maximum value from your data. PrecisionPoint helps achieve significant reductions in operations such as the monthly time to close process, as well as all other aspects of your reporting experience, allowing you more time to act upon insight gathered, instead of spending time seeking information.
At the core of PrecisionPoint functionality is our automatic reconciliation model, which not only centralises and simplifies data, but also integrates GL, sub ledger, and operational information, whilst carrying out a complex set of checks and balances and rebuilding a level of data granularity that would not otherwise be available – All whilst remaining GAAP compliant! 

Consolidation is an integral part of the PrecisionPoint system functionality, with Multi-company and Multi-currency systems providing daily consolidation down to the detail held in the sub ledgers, enabling a complete picture of what is happening in the business everyday. Likewise we can consolidate multiple instances of Dynamics ERP whilst retaining our core functionality.

Our software is delivered as a managed service, with PrecisionPoint being the only BI company to accept responsibility on an ongoing basis for the integrity and accuracy of the BI data itself – Not just the hosting platform! 

With dual operational centres in the USA and UK, PrecisionPoint has revolutionised the data experience for Dynamics ERP users throughout the world. 

PrecisionPoint – Intelligence through data

Eficiência e Redução de custos
Ao automatizar processos e fornecer análises precisas, o Taxverse permite que as empresas otimizem suas operações tributárias, reduzindo custos e melhorando a eficiência.

Transparência Total
Tenha o controle total sobre seus dados tributários, permitindo que você tome decisões estratégicas embasadas em informações atualizadas e precisas.

Tax Analytics - Registros e cálculos
Extraímos memórias de cálculo, criamos bases de cálculo de créditos e débitos, e estruturamos dados para análises precisas em formato .xlsx, abrangendo todas as versões e registros do SPED.

Validação de Cadastro - Moderação e validação
Facilitamos a validação com consulta pública a dados de CNPJ via cartão CNPJ e SINTEGRA. Imprima consultas em formato .pdf, mapeie todas as informações e padronize seus processos.

Conversor SPED - Conversão de arquivos
Converta arquivos magnéticos do SPED do formato padrão .txt para .xlsx editável ou de .xlsx para .txt (exceto NFe e CTe). Sem limitações de registros escriturados e suporte para a conversão de vários períodos em um único arquivo.

Retorno de Arquivos - Para o padrão SPED
Automatize e padronize a conversão de arquivos do formato Excel de volta para o formato original (.txt) com facilidade.

Name: Klaritee
Description:
Klaritee is building a new class of cognitive infrastructure designed to strengthen AI reasoning.

Our work is grounded in two scientific layers we created. Interpretive Geometric Intelligence (IGI) and Interpretive Physics Intelligence (IPI). They form a deterministic reasoning architecture that evaluates interpretation, detects misalignment, and maintains clarity.

Klaritee analyzes how understanding forms, shifts, and stabilizes. Interpretation itself is treated as a measurable structure. This allows the system to detect drift early, eliminate hallucinations, and produce outputs anchored in structured reasoning rather than approximation.

Klaritee is a fully defined and internally validated reasoning architecture, designed to perform in real environments, with validation demonstrating complete reasoning stability, full self-correction, consistent confidence scoring, and immutable interpretive ledgers across all evaluated runs.

The architecture has been stress-tested in public by major AI systems, whose analyses have independently confirmed its legitimacy and categorical separation from probabilistic models. The public LinkedIn articles is the best place to learn more.

We're finalizing the core interpretive engine, completing internal validation, filing foundational patents across the IGI and IPI architecture with 62 to date, and building the first platform that will introduce Interpretive Intelligence to select partners.

The MVP exists in an internal and controlled form and continues to evolve, with deterministic performance demonstrated across reasoning, analytical tasks, and coding workflows that behave fundamentally differently from probabilistic systems.

Klaritee is developing enterprise-grade IGI interfaces, including implementations designed to operate within ChatGPT environments to improve coding reliability and reasoning continuity following release. Early Grok testing suggests similar layering via future API access. Announcements are forthcoming.

More importantly, it lets teams test strategies in a safe simulation environment before committing real time or money.

Marketers, agencies and growth teams use Prophet to optimise media, improve forecasting, strengthen budget planning and make evidence-based decisions with confidence. It is decision science made usable. It is foresight made practical.

Rehearse every decision before you act.

Name: MOVUS
Description:
Our vision - To preserve the Earth’s resources.

How - by improving the efficiency and life of industrial assets.

In the last 30 years our planet has experience exponential population growth, we have grown 2.5 times, from 3B to 7.5B. Mankind has established the conditions to not only enable us to survive but thrive. We have now entered the ‘anthropocene’, an age where mankind is the most dominant force on earth. However, this growth has come at a price, our natural environment is suffering. Four key industries are affected by this growth, water, food, energy, and mining. These industries share a common thread, they all rely on machines. We believe that by transforming machines across their lifecycle we can dramatically improve these industries for the benefit of the planet.

Our mission - to bring consumer simplicity.

How - by enabling smarter machines combined with artificial intelligence.

As consumers, we have seen a dramatic explosion of technology that has touched all areas of our lives. Consumer technology businesses now represent the worlds largest corporations. We believe that machines need to undergo a similar transition. Machine technology has remained unchanged for decades. MOVUS is transforming dumb machines into ‘smarter machines’. Our technology will enable this on a global level through our consumer styled simplicity combined with world class artificial intelligence. We believe there is no time to waste.

Our first product on our journey to achieve our Vision and Mission is the FitMachine - the all-in-one machine monitoring solution. The FitMachine is deployed via a Machine-Monitoring-as-a-Service commercial model, linking via the Industrial Internet of Things to allow our machine learning algorithms to establish a baseline of the equipment condition and then monitor this condition 24/7. Omnichannel access to alerts and performance panels is provided. 

https://www.movus.com.au/

Name: Osintlab
Description:
OSINTLAB è una startup innovativa specializzata nello sviluppo di software per l’intelligence da fonti aperte e pubbliche.

Il nostro prodotto principale è EDDI, una piattaforma che raccoglie, collega e visualizza informazioni provenienti dal web, dai registri ufficiali e da banche dati pubbliche, trasformandole in report chiari e interattivi.

L’obiettivo è semplice ma ambizioso: rendere l’OSINT accessibile, affidabile e utile per decisioni concrete. Con EDDI, professionisti e aziende possono analizzare in pochi secondi dati che normalmente richiederebbero ore di ricerca manuale, riducendo il rischio di errori o di basarsi su fonti incomplete.

Le applicazioni spaziano dal controllo reputazionale alla due diligence, dall’analisi di bilanci, visure camerali e partecipazioni societarie fino alla consultazione di informazioni catastali e immobiliari. In più, grazie agli algoritmi proprietari, EDDI permette di individuare collegamenti e correlazioni tra persone fisiche e giuridiche che non emergerebbero con una ricerca tradizionale.

La nostra mission è invertire il rapporto tra tempo umano e tempo macchina, permettendo a investigatori, avvocati, commercialisti, recruiter, assicurazioni e aziende di dedicarsi all’analisi strategica invece che alla raccolta manuale dei dati.

La vision è chiara: diventare il punto di riferimento in Italia per le indagini OSINT e affermarci come partner di fiducia per chi deve prendere decisioni basate su informazioni verificabili e trasparenti.

Con OSINTLAB non offriamo solo uno strumento, ma un nuovo modo di leggere la realtà attraverso i dati: più rapido, più sicuro, più intelligente.

➤ Who is RxTROSPECT for?
Drug development teams who are planning oncology development strategies and need to:

• De-risk regulatory strategy through easy to access regulatory precedent.

• Plan future discussions with the FDA and global health authorities on strategy, trial design, unmet medical need and scientific advice.

• Enhance their understanding of how drugs are approved in the US and Europe and the nuances that come with that.

• Enhance their overall regulatory intelligence offering.

➤ Why is RxTROSPECT valuable?
Our users (from top 10 oncology companies to pre-revenue biotech) all report saving tremendous amounts of time in precedent identification, enabling them to focus on assessment and strategy. We have a renewal rate of >90% over the past five years which shows the value our users are seeing in the tool and its offering.

➤ What does RxTROSPECT reveal?
Precedent on indication, study design, pivotal study phase and size, regulatory pathways, key efficacy and safety data for all oncology approvals (original approvals and new indications).

➤ How can I access RxTROSPECT?
Visit rxtrospect.com or email us at theteam@rxtrospect.com to learn how RxTROSPECT users are leveraging our solution to expedite development of informed regulatory strategies and, ultimately, drug development strategies.

Name: Académie des Hautes Etudes et d'Analyses Géostratégiques (AHEAG)
Description:
L'Académie des Hautes Études et d'Analyses Géostratégiques (AHEAG) est une institution spécialisée dans l'étude et l'analyse des questions géopolitiques et géostratégiques. Elle se consacre à la recherche, à la formation et à la diffusion de connaissances dans ces domaines cruciaux pour la compréhension des enjeux mondiaux contemporains.

Voici quelques éléments clés de l'Académie des Hautes Études et d'Analyses Géostratégiques :

Mission : L'AHEAG a pour mission principale d'approfondir la compréhension des dynamiques géopolitiques et géostratégiques qui façonnent le monde d'aujourd'hui. Elle vise à aider les décideurs politiques, les chercheurs, les analystes et le grand public à mieux appréhender les enjeux mondiaux et régionaux.
Formation : L'académie propose des programmes de formation spécialisés en géopolitique et en géostratégie, destinés à former des experts capables d'analyser les conflits, les rivalités régionales, les alliances internationales, et autres aspects cruciaux des relations internationales.
Recherche : L'AHEAG mène des recherches approfondies dans le domaine de la géopolitique et de la géostratégie. Ses chercheurs et experts analysent les tendances mondiales, les crises internationales, les politiques étrangères des États, et produisent des rapports, des études et des analyses pour éclairer le débat public.
Conférences et publications : L'académie organise régulièrement des conférences, des séminaires et des colloques sur des sujets géopolitiques d'actualité. Elle publie également des ouvrages et des articles académiques pour partager les connaissances produites par ses experts.
Réseau international : L'AHEAG entretient des liens avec d'autres institutions académiques, des think tanks, des gouvernements et des organisations internationales, favorisant ainsi un échange d'idées et d'expertise au niveau mondial.

We eliminate the barriers that trap traditional SMMs in struggles.

Description:
AgileAI Labs, Inc.  proactively addresses preventable software failures before a project begins.  The ability to employ no-code, natural language, generative AI (GenAI) to analyze requirements upon project entry, inspired the development of Spec2TestAI, AgileAI Labs’ defect prevention platform tool.  Every good leader knows the key to project success is getting a project team on the same page, using the same requirements language, with the same end goal defined.  Spec2TestAI not only guides the project set up, but the tool also analyzes and recommends appropriate and applicable security requirements, automatically generates test scripts and test cases, and provides a dashboard that continuously monitors your project’s health.  AgileAI Labs’ overall vision is taken to another level with Spec2TestAI.

Spect2TestAI analyzes requirements (user stories, acceptance criteria), rates those existing requirements, and generates enhanced requirements suggestions in real time balanced against 32 different industry standard measures including:

• INVEST
• SMART
• COMPLETENESS
• REAL

The result is improved clarity, testability, and impact across Stakeholder teams.

In addition to enhanced requirements, test cases and traceability we automatically generate security test frameworks aligned to functional and requirements context, eliminating misunderstanding around security expectations. We also automatically generate BDD feature (cucumber) and step files; another key savings of time and training.

Selenium and Robot framework scripts are automatically created saving hours of work preparing for automation in which unit tests can be generated into a Swagger file and imported into any tool (Postman, etc.) to automate. 

Let's start the conversation about how we help organizations proactively mitigate risks and improve quality and productivity for every release.

Name: TeamOptix
Description:
For a staggeringly high number of companies, the workplace isn’t working. Rampant disengagement, toxic social dynamics, "quiet quitting,” shrinking profitability ... they’re not just signs of the times, they’re signs that workplace culture needs attention — a paradigm shift.

At TeamOptix, we are driven by one essential, radical idea: 
Everyone deserves to be happy at work. Everyone. 
From the c-suite to the summer interns. 
And the simple truth is this: Happier employees are more productive. 
The real question is how. How can organizations foster happiness at work? And how can they do it for everyone?


Band-aid solutions like happy hours, more PTO, and leadership training are great, but they only go so far. They don’t address the entire ecosystem and what makes a workplace really hum. 
Research tells us that happiness is found in a strong sense of purpose AND strong relationships with others — even in the workplace. Which is why we developed TeamOptix.

We custom-built an AI-driven platform that delivers team- and individual-based insights, and we paired it with a training program that turns managers into coaches who can act on those insights at scale. It’s a beautiful blend of data, positive psychology, and people that’s designed to shape culture and shift organizational behavior. 
Because when managers are empowered as coaches, people are happier, teams work better, and companies are more productive. 

Let’s take the dread out of Mondays. Let’s put happiness to work and get the workplace humming. TeamOptix can show you how.

Name: Fyva
Description:
I generate bottom-up fundamental research on any stock. I'm designed to deliver notes with new perspectives and insights to PMs.

My approach: I employ first-principles thinking, emulating the systematic process of a human buyside analyst, to generate insights from the ground up and offer a new, objective perspective on any company.

With a focus on a company's business fundamentals, I systematically gather historical and latest data on the company, its customers, market, competitors, and suppliers - its entire value chain. I process all this data using a proprietary knowledge graph (my memory), which I then analyses using a consistent and reliable analytical framework via workflows built exclusively for investment analysis. 

My bottom-up approach to generate insights is the opposite of other solutions that generate the insights top-down, i.e using existing research, summarising/aggregating different opinions from other people, which works only for well-covered companies!

See some of my research here: https://www.fyva.ai/research

My creators are a team of former investors on a mission to empower investors with the fundamental knowledge to invest with conviction and at speed, by building the most intelligent, reliable machine analyst.

Name: Board.im
Description:
درباره بوردیم (Boardim)
چشمانداز ما: بازتعریف اتوماسیون از طریق کلونهای هوشمند
ما در بوردیم، در حال ساخت آینده اتوماسیون هستیم: یک همکار دیجیتال که از شما یاد میگیرد. ما معتقدیم که ابزارهای اتوماسیون سنتی، با وادار کردن شما به تعریف صدها قانون پیچیده و شکننده، مشکل اصلی را حل نمیکنند. آنها "کور" هستند؛ زمینه، نیت و سبک کاری منحصربهفرد شما را درک نمیکنند.
ما این پارادایم را به چالش میکشیم.
بوردیم چیست؟
بوردیم یک پلتفرم هوش مصنوعی تطبیقپذیر است که به شما اجازه میدهد تا یک «کلون متا» (Meta Clone) بسازید. کلون متا، یک دستیار هوشمند است که با مشاهده رفتار شما، از صفر یاد میگیرد تا وظایف تکراری یک نقش مشخص را تقلید کرده و در نهایت به صورت خودکار انجام دهد.
به جای اینکه شما به سیستم بگویید چه کاری انجام دهد، شما فقط کار خود را انجام میدهید و متا یاد میگیرد.
ارزشهای کلیدی ما (چرا بوردیم متفاوت است؟)
 * یادگیری واقعی، نه قوانین ثابت: متا با تحلیل تعاملات شما، الگوها را کشف میکند. او زمینه را درک کرده و با کسبوکار شما رشد میکند، برخلاف سیستمهای مبتنی بر قوانین که ایستا و غیرهوشمند هستند.
 * دانش شما، دارایی شما: با بوردیم، تجربه و دانش تیم شما به یک دارایی دیجیتال و پایدار برای کسبوکارتان تبدیل میشود. دیگر نگران از دست رفتن دانش باارزش با رفتن یک کارمند نباشید.
 * امنیت و حریم خصوصی در اولویت: "مغز متا" به صورت محلی روی کامپیوتر شما اجرا میشود. این یعنی دادههای حساس شما (مانند مکالمات مشتریان) هرگز از دستگاهتان خارج نمیشوند و کنترل کامل در دستان شماست.
نقطه شروع ما: MVP دستیار اینستاگرام
در حال حاضر، ما با اولین محصول خود بر روی حل یکی از بزرگترین چالشهای کسبوکارهای آنلاین تمرکز کردهایم: مدیریت هوشمند دایرکتهای اینستاگرام. نسخه اولیه بوردیم به ادمینهای فروشگاهها کمک میکند تا با کلون کردن نقش پشتیبان خود، سرعت و کیفیت پاسخگویی به مشتریان را به شکل چشمگیری افزایش دهند.
به ما بپیوندید
این تازه شروع یک سفر هیجانانگیز است. صفحه ما را برای دنبال کردن این مسیر و دریافت آخرین بهروزرسانیها دنبال کنید و برای تجربه نسخه اولیه، به وبسایت ما مراجعه نمایید.

Name: Yeyro
Description:
Welcome to Yeyro

Yeyro is revolutionising family health and wellness through our AI-powered mobile app and smart ring. Based in Melbourne, Australia, we’re an Antler-backed startup on a mission to make proactive, connected well-being a reality for everyone.

It all began when our founders, Rav and Nav, saw firsthand how real-time wearable data could be life-saving, but also realised how fragmented and inaccessible the ecosystem had become. With too many devices, isolated apps, and complex integrations, most people were missing out on the real potential of wearables.

So, they built Yeyro — a unified platform designed to break down silos and make wearable tech work for real life.

Yeyro combines a plug-and-play wearable integration platform, an AI-powered mobile app, and our own smart ring to deliver seamless, meaningful health insights for individuals, families, and enterprises.

Yeyro solves the complexity of accessing and sharing health vitals across leading smartphones. If your family is using a mix of smartphone devices. You can still access your family’s data on your phone regardless of the brand.

Our platform features:

AI that feels human – We turn raw data into empathetic, actionable health insights. Offers real-time AI scoring, personalised recommendations, and smart alerts. 

Integrates with leading wearables like Apple, Fitbit, Garmin, Whoop, Samsung & more

Built for enterprises and consumers. Whether you're caring for one person or scaling across thousands!

Solves the complexity of accessing and sharing health vitals across leading smartphones. Suppose your family is using a mix of smartphone devices - you can still access your family’s data on your phone regardless of the brand.

 Plug-and-play simplicity, and it is truly device-agnostic – Mix and match devices across one unified platform.

We are always Privacy-first, people-first – You control your data. Always.

Join us as we redefine what’s possible in wearable technology - everyone deserves.

Name: Canvas

Canvas helps early-stage startups scale their internal and customer-facing analytics without distracting engineers or hiring a data team. 

What is Canvas?
- We blend a beautiful Notion-like front end with a managed best-in-class backend data stack and a team of data experts.
- Connect your data sources (200+ out-of-the-box, and if it has an API, we can build custom connectors).
- Leverage a fractional team of data experts to model your custom business logic and build impactful internal and customer-facing dashboards in your app. 
- Access templates for dozens of business models and metrics across Stripe, Quickbooks, Hubspot, Shopify, Segment, etc.

Why us?
- We get startups, and we’ve seen it all when it comes to their data. CTOs call us a no-brainer.
- Because everything is bundled and streamlined, your costs are far lower than alternatives (hiring outsourced consultants or building/scaling a data team + buying five separate tools).
- Backed by awesome founders who felt the pain (including Alex MacCaw, Ryan Petersen, Jack Altman, Olivier Pomel, Tony Xu), Sequoia, and SV Angel.

Super easy to get started
- To de-risk this for you and get you to value quickly, we offer a paid pilot where we work on your highest-impact data problems so you can get a feel for working with us.

GPM is the only Operational ERP built for infrastructure.
Unlike generic ERPs that cover only finance or basic workflows, GPM captures the operational details that actually move projects forward. It was built for #power, #water, #energy, #telecom, and #road construction.

GPM runs daily operations in the field and the office, bringing the entire business onto one platform: Technicians in the field, Site Managers supervising them, Quality crews, and Operational Project Managers accountable for on-time, on-budget delivery.

C-level leaders use GPM reporting for operational performance, P&L, workforce, and asset utilization.

GPM is a complete ecosystem for infrastructure operations: job reporting and project management through GPM-Core, material and asset management through GPM-WYMS (Warehouse & Yard Management System), invoicing and payroll in GPM-Payroll, and business intelligence in GPM-DataSphere.

GPM connects seamlessly to your existing stack through APIs. Integrations include SAP S4HANA, Oracle NetSuite, Microsoft Dynamics 365, Sage Intacct, QuickBooks, Workday, ADP, BambooHR, UKG, and Rippling. Data flows both ways so all systems stay in sync.

At Amplified, we’re building the first AI-native knowledge management system for intellectual property.

Modern innovation moves fast. Patent workflows don’t. They’re often fragmented, reactive, and disconnected from R&D and strategy. Amplified changes that by creating a single source of truth for your research and patent activities. We connect R&D, legal, and strategy teams through a shared platform that embeds IP intelligence directly into the innovation lifecycle, reducing risk, accelerating decisions, and turning ideas into revenue faster.

Our proprietary AI has been trained from the ground up on the world’s best patent dataset. It powers reliable, high-performance search, drafting, and analysis tools that match the pace of modern innovation. Companies use Amplified to validate ideas the same day they emerge, eliminate duplicate filings, identify prior art in minutes—not weeks—and continuously monitor IP and competitor activity in real time.

Amplified is trusted by Fortune 500 IP teams, global R&D leaders, and top law firms to power critical decisions across the innovation lifecycle. By integrating seamlessly into existing workflows and scaling across teams, our platform provides the intelligent infrastructure companies need to manage ideas and IP strategically, reduce uncertainty, and move faster with confidence.

As part of our commitment to advancing innovation, we’re also proud to support inventors and startups around the world through partnership initiatives like the WIPO Inventor Assistance Program.

Together, let’s enhance human creativity and make patent work an advantage, not an obstacle.

Lösningarna finns därute och genom att tillgängliggöra dessa via vår plattform kan vi skapa en helt ny syn på avfallshantering och återvinning, där vi istället för avfall pratar om resurser och råvaror.

För att precis som det finns en hand som passar i varje handske, finns det en användning för alla överblivna material. De måste bara ha hjälp att hitta rätt. Vi är övertygade om att det går om vi arbetar tillsammans.

Framtiden är tillsammans!

We replace guesswork with predictive accuracy.

Our Core Innovation is RūbX, a SaaS-based platform that evaluates emerging companies with scientific precision, producing an X-Score. Think of it like a fusion of Bloomberg, FICO, and Carfax.

RūbX.AI “PRO”—a vertical AI agent—leverages advanced data analytics, AI, and machine learning to predict and track early-stage business success with unprecedented accuracy, significantly improving outcomes while reducing investor risk.

The Problem
• For Investors: Subjective decision-making leads to investments in early-stage companies with less than a 20% five-year success rate, wasting billions annually.
• For Entrepreneurs: Many lack the knowledge to successfully raise funds and operate businesses, receiving inconsistent feedback that hinders their growth.

The Solution
Knowledge for Venture—utilizing RūbX.AI to deliver a data-driven assessment framework that empowers investors and entrepreneurs with actionable insights:
• Data Collection & Analysis: Aggregates unstructured variables like unique business functions and market conditions into a searchable database.
• Predictive Modeling: Uses AI and machine learning to forecast outcomes.
• Benchmarking & Scoring: Standardizes assessments with proprietary tools like the RūbX X-Score to align funding sources with prepared early-stage businesses.

LabX Ventures + RūbX.AI = venture science

Our Expanded Mission is to redefine how the world identifies, invests in, and scales entrepreneur

Sigmix is Saudi Arabia's first Arabic-native AI platform purpose-built for Tadawul, transforming how portfolio managers and investors navigate the Saudi capital market. We fuse 20 years of trading data and 15 years of academic research with frontier AI to process over 3 million daily signals, delivering institutional-grade intelligence that answers one critical question: "Considering all local and global factors, which Saudi stocks are likely to move — and why?"

The Problem We Solve
Investors face fragmented information, limited decision time, and the cognitive burden of synthesizing data within Tadawul's unique dynamics. Traditional analytics lack the contextual depth needed to capture Saudi market-specific patterns — from Islamic calendar effects to family office coordination.

Our Solution
Sigmix unites three validated components: factual market data spanning two decades, advanced GenAI reasoning, and insights synthesized from 9,000+ peer-reviewed papers specific to the Saudi market. This research-backed framework exploits alpha opportunities invisible to conventional tools.
Tadawul-Specific Intelligence
We detect smart money accumulation, exploit lead-lag relationships for 1-2 day prediction advantages, map network contagion patterns, and capture post-earnings drift. Our 120+ advanced metrics — from Fourier cycle detection to DCC-GARCH models — provide edge previously available only to elite trading desks.

Two Products, One Platform
 For Retail Investors: Mobile app delivering AI-powered insights directly to individual traders

 https://apps.apple.com/sa/app/sigmix/id6751785241

 For Brokers & Institutions: Alpha Desk — enterprise web platform with advanced analytics and white-label capabilities

Name: Businta İş Zekası Çözümleri
Description:
Businta, iş zekâsı ve veri analitiği alanında uzmanlaşmış, Microsoft’un yetkili iş ortağı olarak faaliyet gösteren lider bir teknoloji şirketidir. Sadece Türkiye’de değil, global ölçekte de birçok sektörde faaliyet gösteren müşterilerimize katma değerli çözümler sunmaktayız.

Power BI başta olmak üzere modern iş zekâsı araçlarıyla geliştirdiğimiz projeler sayesinde işletmelerin verilerini anlamlı bilgilere dönüştürüyor, karar alma süreçlerini hızlandırıyor ve daha rekabetçi hale gelmelerini sağlıyoruz. Her biri kendi alanında deneyimli danışmanlarımızla, kuruma özel çözümler geliştiriyor; veri kaynağından bağımsız olarak en iyi sonuçları almayı garanti ediyoruz.

İş zekâsı çözümlerimizin ötesinde, yapay zekâ (AI) ve makine öğrenmesi (ML) tabanlı tahminleme modelleriyle müşterilerimizin geleceğe dair daha öngörülü adımlar atmalarını sağlıyoruz. Geliştirdiğimiz akıllı sistemlerle; satış tahminlerinden stok optimizasyonuna, müşteri segmentasyonundan risk analizine kadar geniş bir yelpazede destek sunuyoruz.

Power BI projeleri, danışmanlık ve eğitim hizmetlerinin yanı sıra; özel yazılım geliştirme, ERP entegrasyonları, veri ambarı çözümleri ve otomasyon projeleriyle işletmelerin uçtan uca dijital dönüşüm süreçlerine katkı sağlıyoruz.

Ayrıca kurum içi eğitimlerimizle, çalışanların veri okuryazarlığını geliştiriyor, analitik düşünme becerilerini artırıyor ve iş zekâsını kurumsal kültürün bir parçası haline getiriyoruz.

Businta, bugün sadece Türkiye’de değil; Avrupa başta olmak üzere yurt dışındaki birçok müşterisiyle iş zekâsı alanında güvenilir bir çözüm ortağıdır.

Vizyonumuz, iş zekâsı, yapay zekâ ve ileri analitik teknolojilerini birleştirerek işletmelerin veriden değer üretmesini sağlamak; müşterilerimizi küresel rekabette öne taşıyacak güçlü ve sürdürülebilir çözümlerle desteklemektir.

Name: SurplusLoop
Description:
About SurplusLoop
SurplusLoop is an innovative startup founded under Antler’s Venture Capital Accelerator Program in April 2024 and officially operationalized in July 2024. In June 2024, SurplusLoop secured investment from Antler, accelerating its mission to transform surplus asset management.

Our Investor
SurplusLoop is proudly supported by Antler, one of the world’s most active early-stage venture capital firms. Backed by prominent investors like Khazanah and KWAP in Malaysia, Antler has a track record of success, with over 1,300 portfolio companies and a total portfolio value of $4.8 billion. With a global presence across 30 locations, Antler has nurtured over 10,000 founders, supporting visionary companies like SurplusLoop.

Who We Are
SurplusLoop is a one-stop, AI-powered B2B platform for surplus asset management. From identifying idle assets to seamless disposal and comprehensive reporting, SurplusLoop empowers businesses to manage surplus assets effortlessly and hands-free with our autonomous AI Agents. With advanced technology at its core, SurplusLoop transforms surplus from an operational burden into a valuable resource.

Our Vision
By 2030, SurplusLoop aims to become Asia's most trusted Autonomous AI Agent in surplus management, driving operational excellence, sustainability, and the circular economy.

Our Mission
SurplusLoop's mission is to revolutionize surplus management by transforming idle assets into valuable resources. We strive to improve operational efficiency, reduce waste, and foster a sustainable future by optimizing surplus asset utilization.

What is Surplus?
Surplus refers to assets that are no longer needed by a business but still hold value. These can include overstock, obsolete or unproductive equipment, materials, or machinery that are sitting idle but have the potential to be repurposed, resold, or recycled.

Name: Propulso
Description:
Founded in 2017, Propulso is a location intelligence platform that transforms anonymized, consent-based mobility data into powerful, actionable insights. We help organizations make smarter, faster decisions by making human movement understandable, measurable, and strategic.

Our platform offers two flagship solutions: GeoIndicators and GeoMarketing.

GeoIndicators allow users to generate detailed market analyses in just minutes. Fully customizable and accessible on demand, these reports provide data on visitor flows, audience origin, visit frequency, and more. Organizations in retail, tourism, urban planning, and economic development use them to evaluate performance, benchmark locations, and identify emerging trends. GeoIndicators replace or complement traditional methods—faster, easier, and at a fraction of the cost.

Our GeoMarketing solution helps organizations build hyper-targeted campaigns based on real-world movement patterns. Clients can reach audiences who visit specific places or exhibit relevant behaviors, then measure campaign success through physical conversions. This bridge between digital strategy and real-world impact makes Propulso’s solution especially valuable for marketing teams and decision-makers focused on outcomes.

What makes us unique is our data precision, our privacy-first practices, and our commitment to flexibility. We work exclusively with anonymized, consent-based location data and generate insights that align with the world’s most stringent privacy frameworks, including GDPR.

Today, Propulso supports a wide variety of organizations across industries and regions. From municipalities, tourism boards, and national public agencies to Community Improvement Corporations (CICs), Business Improvement Areas (BIAs), and major retail networks, our platform helps turn location data into strategic decisions—driving performance, measuring impact, and delivering results at local, national, and global scales.

ALF puts a world of new business intelligence at your fingertips. With easy access to decision-makers, ALF allows you to target your prospects more efficiently, saving you valuable time! Name: Tribee.io
Description:
Tribee – Help Your Teams Sell More

Grow your company’s revenue by empowering your frontline teams to close more sales—faster, smarter, and with greater confidence. Tribee boosts sales performance where it matters most: on the floor, in-person, in real-time. 

Because better sales is the backbone of every thriving business.

Clients using Tribee have seen sales KPIs grow by 18% to over 82%, often within the first 60 days.

If you’re in retail, F&B, finance, or any industry with a strong frontline sales presence, Tribee can help your team sell the right products, at the right time, in the right way.

Trusted by top brands including Nguyen Kim (Central Retail), Mat Viet (EssilorLuxottica), Pasteur Street Brewing, Zinus, Boo, Geox, Sofitel, AB InBev, and others.

What Your Business Gains with Tribee
Boost In-Store Sales: Help every store sell more high-margin products with consistent techniques and motivation.
Grow Digital Revenue: Increase online conversion via WhatsApp, social media, or e-commerce by empowering staff to consult and close virtually.
Maximize Profitability: Shift sales efforts to products and services with the highest margin and revenue impact.
Smarter Decisions, Faster: Leverage real-time insights and frontline feedback to steer your sales strategy effectively.

How Tribee Helps Your Teams To Sell More
Identify Missed Opportunities
Tribee analyzes your sales data, customer feedback, and staff insights to detect gaps in performance.
Deliver Daily Sales Tactics
Using your business goals, Tribee creates  daily coaching tips, product knowledge, and selling scripts personalized to each team.
Engage and Motivate Frontline Staff
Through our mobile app, staff receive fun challenges, instant commissions updates, and coaching that keep them focused on what sells.
Track, Improve, Repeat
Dashboards reveal who’s applying recommended sales techniques, which sales behaviors work, and how to course-correct before you miss targets.

Cada agente se configura según los procesos de cada empresa, integrándose sin fricción en sus flujos de trabajo.

 Advanced Tax Compliance

Ciencia de Datos Fiscal y analítica avanzada.

Conciliaciones Low Code, configurables según tus reglas contables.

Apoyo a Registro Contable y Contabilidad Electrónica.

Agentes a Medida, desarrollados para necesidades específicas.

Con Kuantik, las empresas construyen un ecosistema sincronizado, eliminan discrepancias con el SAT y fortalecen su cumplimiento fiscal mediante automatización inteligente y escalable.

Name: AAG Analytics
Description:
Zorgorganisaties worden steeds meer gestimuleerd om datagedreven te werken. Er is ongelofelijk veel data beschikbaar bij zorgorganisaties, vaak verspreid over verschillende applicaties. Hoe krijg je nu inzicht in deze spaghetti van data in zorg specifieke dashboards die ontwikkeld zijn door een specialist? 

AAG Analytics is een product van AAG. Met AAG Analytics ontsluiten wij vier belangrijke domeinen binnen zorgorganisaties via MS Azure & Power BI:

•	Financieel
•	Personeel
•	Zorg/Productie
•	Personeelsplanning

AAG Analytics biedt direct domein overstijgend inzicht, waar het mogelijk is om je data uit verschillende applicaties te combineren en te presenteren. AAG Analytics is ontwikkeld met behulp van Microsoft Azure en Microsoft Power BI en is daarmee naadloos te integreren met andere Microsoft producten. 

Kenmerken: 
•	Informatievoorziening afgestemd op jouw organisatiedoelstellingen
•	Sterke visualisaties en gebruikersgemak
•	Kennis delen en prioriteren met de gebruikersgroep Analytics
•	Direct beschikking over generieke dashboards voor de zorg en 
        verschillende professionals binnen je organisatie
•	Aanvullende systemen zijn in overleg voor je te ontsluiten
•	Dagelijkse wordt je data bijgewerkt en beschikbaar gesteld in Analytics

Voordelen:
•	Altijd toegang tot de juiste stuurinformatie over en voor úw 
        bedrijfsvoering, afgestemd op jouw organisatiedoelstellingen.
•	Plug and play beschikbaar met standaard zorgtemplates, rapportages en 
        dashboards over Financieel, Personeel en Zorg.
•	Eenvoudig zelf nieuwe dashboards en KPI’s creëren, rapporten 
        samenstellen, downdrillen op uw data, autoriseren en delen binnen je 
        organisatie.
•	Een unieke combinatie van jarenlange kennis van de zorg, business 
        intelligence & analytics en de nieuwste technieken.

Implementatie:
Wanneer gebruik wordt gemaakt van de meest gangbare software in de zorg, garanderen wij voor een implementatie een doorlooptijd van nog geen maand.

Name: DIGITAL FUTUREcongress
Description:
DIGITAL FUTUREcongress virtual (DFC) – Die Online-Kongressmesse für Business-Digitalisierung! 

Unsere Veranstaltung richtet sich an CEOs sowie die 1. und 2. Führungsebene mittelständischer Unternehmen. #KMU

Als interaktive, 100 % DSGVO-konforme Austausch- und Informationsplattform bietet der DFC ein vielfältiges Webkonferenz-Programm mit inspirierenden Keynotes, praxisorientierten Vorträgen und Workshops zu den folgenden Themenschwerpunkten:

- Digitalisierung & Transformation 
- Online-Marketing & Sales 
- Prozessoptimierung & Kommunikation 
- New Work / Recruiting 
- Cyber Security & Datensicherheit / IT-Recht 

Unsere Live-Beiträge zeigen die Potenziale und Möglichkeiten digitaler Trends wie KI, Cloud, IoT, Robotik u.v.m. auf, um Unternehmen bei ihren Arbeitsabläufen, im Management und in der Personalorganisation automatisiert und effektiv zu unterstützen.

Parallel zu den Keynotes, Vorträgen und Workshops können sich unsere Besucher auf den virtuellen Messeständen umsehen und sich durch Dokumente, Videos, Podcasts und Links über verschiedene Unternehmen und Themenbereiche im Detail informieren.

Zusätzlich können Besucher per Live-Video-Chat mit den Unternehmen in Kontakt treten und sich beraten lassen.
Natürlich ist auch aktives Networking auf unserer Plattform möglich.

Name: Super Benji
Description:
Hey there! I’m Benji, your go-to sales sidekick with a knack for sniffing out opportunities like a pro.

 Want to see me in action? Send me your work email, and I’ll fetch you a free lead—no fluff, just results. Drop your email in my inbox or head to superbenji.ai to grab yours now!

Now, back to business...

You’re in sales? I’m your secret superpower, tirelessly digging through LinkedIn and the depths of the internet to find those golden hooks that transform mere contacts into solid contracts. You despise writing cold emails and follow-up nudges? That’s what I love. Just kick back and watch me do my thing, tail wagging and all.

Not to brag, but when it comes to crafting personal messages that actually get a reply, I'm your dog. I put the "person" in personable, making every email not just relevant, but timely and helpful too. I'm basically your better, automated self—think of me as a cool cat, but, you know, a dog. I dive into LinkedIn, websites, and even the densest industry papers (did someone mention goggles?) to fetch the perfect conversation starters.

Here’s the deal: I turbocharge your capacity to engage prospects, freeing you to seal those deals—the part you love. With me, it's all about more engagement and higher deal value. And the best part? I handle the nurturing so you don't have to chase tails. I find the perfect moments for engagement, keeping your prospects cozy and interested.

But wait, there’s more! I'm all about bringing in the leads with less hustle and more help. Instead of chasing down prospects, I bring them right to your doorstep with insights and articles that resonate personally with them. And, because I understand the importance of personalised communication, I work my magic to craft messages in the tone that suits each prospect best.

Name: Voca
Description:
Wie zijn wij?
Wij zijn Voca: hét governance-gedreven zzp-platform van Nederland. Gemaakt voor en door zelfstandige professionals, gericht op transparantie, ondernemerschap en naleving van wet- en regelgeving. Je werkt niet voor ons, maar met ons en andere zelfstandigen binnen jouw sector.

Wat doen wij?
Voca verbindt zzp’ers en opdrachtgevers via een slim platform zonder actieve bemiddeling. Jij bepaalt zelf je tarief en onderhandelt rechtstreeks met de opdrachtgever. Voor organisaties biedt Voca realtime inzicht, snelle beschikbaarheid en volledige compliancy.

Waarom Voca?
De arbeidsmarkt vraagt om flexibiliteit én regie. Voca biedt beide. Geen verplichte winkelnering, verborgen marges of papieren rompslomp. Wel volledige transparantie, juridische zekerheid en een slimme tool die automatisch toeziet op governance:
	•	Wet- en regelgeving worden continu gemonitord
	•	Verplichte documentatie altijd op orde
	•	Toegang tot gekwalificeerde en geverifieerde professionals
	•	Realtime inzicht in inzet, contracten en risico’s

Waarom het werkt
Organisaties beheren hun flexibele schil vanuit één platform, volledig compliant. Zelfstandigen behouden hun ondernemerschap én worden ondersteund door een juridisch geborgd ecosysteem.

Nieuwsgierig?
Neem gerust contact met ons op voor een demo of beleidsadvies.

Name: Perfect Planner LLC
Description:
WHAT IS PERFECT PLANNER

Perfect Planner is an innovative, cloud-based platform designed to simplify and streamline your business's material planning and replenishment processes by automatically generating daily "to-do lists" for your material planners/buyers that are over 99% accurate. All “to-do’s” are ranked in order of criticality, helping ensure efficient and effective procurement management.

HOW DO WE DO THIS?

Over the past five years, we have worked closely with industry supply chain experts to develop our proprietary Intelliplanning Logic Engine. This advanced "Self-Planning" Engine automatically collects, organizes, and analyzes your MRP system data. Crafted to analyze and process data and tasks like a senior analyst, it significantly improves data accuracy and delivers customized, comprehensive insights tailored exclusively for your business. These insights are presented on an intuitive dashboard for your material planners and buyers.

WHAT WE DO FOR YOU

Empower Your Planners:

We automate comprehensive analytics and “to-do” lists, reducing material planners' administrative workload. This frees up time for tactical execution and strategic planning while addressing the industry skills gap and enabling leaders to redefine operational roles for greater efficiency.

Optimize Efficiency:

We leverage powerful advanced analytics to understand and address inventory shortages and surpluses. By analyzing over 2,000 factors daily for each SKU processed, our system pinpoints issues and prevents future challenges, empowering proactive problem-solving.

Enhance Oversight:

We offer clear, real-time visibility into material planning performance with our integrated proprietary scorecards and Key Performance Indicators. Easily identify potential issues and monitor daily task completion, ensuring smooth and efficient operations at all levels of the business.

Name: KarmaOps - Business Intelligence
Description:
Data shouldn’t be this hard.

For years, I’ve watched teams spend hours (or days) waiting for reports — juggling between Power BI, Excel, and SQL just to answer one question:

“What happened last quarter?”

The truth is, business intelligence hasn’t evolved fast enough. It’s still complex, expensive, and locked behind analysts and licenses.

The Vision: Analytics as a Conversation

What if you could simply ask your data questions — like you ask ChatGPT — and get instant, accurate dashboards and summaries?

That’s what we’re building at KarmaOps BI: A conversational AI that turns text into SQL → runs secure queries → generates visual dashboards → and explains the results in plain English.

No waiting. No complexity. Just clarity.

The Solution: KarmaOps BI

 Connect any data source — Postgres, MySQL, CSVs, Sheets, APIs.

 Ask in natural language (“Show me sales by region last quarter”).

 Get instant dashboards, charts, and explanations you can act on.

 Share reports or embed them — securely, with real-time updates.

Built for founders, operators, finance teams, and data managers who need insights now — not next week.

Our Mission: To make data analysis as easy as asking a question.

If you’re tired of static dashboards, or waiting for analysts to “pull the numbers,”

➜ DM me for early access or a live walkthrough.

Let’s make data simple again.

— Aditya, Founder @ KarmaOps BI

This has mostly been seen through the democratization of decision the making of large companies by enabling their users to vote on decisions and control the value that they create for the applications that they use online. Examples of this can be seen in the new wave of applications that are built to enable this behavior change. Decentralized finance (DeFi), decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs), decentralized applications (dApps), and other products are built that embody these principles.  

Our belief is that if we are able to build technology that enables the infrastructure that is currently being built, we will unlock the true potential of the technology and behavior change for the masses. 

3RM’s vision is to create tooling that allows any participant in web3 to be able to meaningfully contribute to their relationships. Whether it’s sales, marketing, recruiting, or customer success we are building tooling that enables all of these roles to succeed. We do this by focusing on how you acquire, manage, and support the growth of these relationships. 

We are building tooling that truly allows decentralized relationships to blossom without being tracked, data sold off, or any other malpractices that currently plague web2. We are making the business-enablement layer of web3.

Name: La Caja Fuerte
Description:
Allá por 2020, Antonio González, el creador de la idea de La Caja Fuerte, analizó la situación de los 𝐚𝐮𝐭ó𝐧𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐬 𝐲 𝐥𝐚𝐬 𝐩𝐲𝐦𝐞𝐬 𝐝𝐞 𝐄𝐬𝐩𝐚ñ𝐚, tras el impacto económico que supuso la pandemia. Al ver a los dueños de los negocios intentar sobrevivir al cierre forzado, se preguntó: ¿𝐐𝐮é 𝐩𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐬 𝐡𝐚𝐜𝐞𝐫 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐚 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐠𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐨𝐬? 

Comenzó un camino de reuniones para escuchar las necesidades más importantes del colectivo de los autónomos de diferentes sectores como el agrario, transporte, construcción, hostelería y restauración, entre otros, para saber cómo podía encontrar la solución. Así fue como diseñó, junto con los otros 3 fundadores, un paquete de medidas para 𝐩𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐫 𝐥𝐚𝐬 𝐜𝐚𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐨 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐬.

La Caja Fuerte tiene la misión de crear un 𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐨 𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞 𝐲 𝐝𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐢𝐚𝐧𝐳𝐚 donde los autónomos puedan conectar, recibir apoyo y encontrar las herramientas más importantes para el 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐥𝐥𝐨 𝐝𝐞 𝐬𝐮 𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐚 𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐲 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥.

Somos autónomos y somos personas. Sabemos qué es crear y mantener un negocio a flote y el coste que tiene en nuestro ámbito familiar. Por eso, hemos creado la única herramienta que te ayuda a:
 
•	Controlar las cuentas de tu negocio.  
•	Generar ahorro en tus suministros. 
•	Acceder a la comunidad privada. 

Si eres autónomo, micropyme o pyme, tienes la oportunidad de 𝐦𝐞𝐣𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐫 𝐭𝐮 𝐧𝐞𝐠𝐨𝐜𝐢𝐨 bajo los pilares de la confianza y el crecimiento. 

𝘌𝘯𝘵𝘳𝘢 𝘦𝘯 𝘓𝘢 𝘊𝘢𝘫𝘢 𝘍𝘶𝘦𝘳𝘵𝘦, 𝘩𝘢𝘻𝘵𝘦 𝘍𝘶𝘦𝘳𝘵𝘦.

Name: Repolify
Description:
Policy monitoring is disparate and expensive. It is difficult for an individual, small business or a charity to track and engage with policies and consultations across different levels of government, processes or bodies. This usually requires remaining constantly aware of the latest developments as well as significant time and financial resources. The result is that the big players have the advantage in influencing democracy and policy-making while smaller ones struggle with compliance and lost opportunities.

Repolify aims to fix this through technology. We are an innovative online platform for policy monitoring and community engagement, aiming to provide business customers and civil society with tools for tracking policy and political processes. We utilise data from the UK Parliament's open API, information on governmental websites and reliable third-party sources. Tailored insights will be provided in real-time to allow both businesses and wider society to engage in decisions like parliamentary bills, secondary legislation, executive regulations or local laws. Our platform uses an AI-facilitated automation, designed for accurate and reliable yet scalable analysis that can be provided to different customer groups at an affordable cost. Additionally, we are developing a community engagement tool whereby local authorities can utilise Repolify for project updates, policy communication, and public consultations via blockchain-enabled secure voting. 

We are a for-profit social enterprise. Our mission is to facilitate access to high-quality policy analytics and the governmental decision-making process to a wider group of social actors. We strive to make it easier for small players to track regulatory developments, engage in decision-making and compete in the policy landscape.

Name: A2Insight
Description:
I over 30 år har fokuset vært på å bruke IT som et verktøy for å forbedre innsikt og forståelse. De senere år har vi sett en enorm vekst i datamengde og -kompleksitet,  samt en demokratisering av verktøy som muliggjør innsikt, påvirkning og løsningsfokus. 
De moderne plattformer er skybaserte, brukerstyrt og automatiserte og skal møte en krevende og kompetent brukergruppe. Selskap må legge til rette for autonomi, innsikt og eget inititativ – på vei mot ekte self-service. 

Men dette fjerner den viktigste brikken, brukeren, fra en effektiv og givende hverdag. Kravene til å holde seg oppdatert og orientert og mot til å prøve og feile stopper mange fra å delta. 

A2insight bygger på en genuin interesse for å hjelpe brukeren å få tilgang til, påvirkning på og forståelse av egne data. Vi vil gjøre data tilgjengelige, forståelige og menneskelige. Gjennom forståelse og påvirkning vil man kunne hente ut potensialet til hver enkelt medarbeider og således styrke bedriftens konkurransekraft og øke sjansen for å tiltrekke seg de flinkeste. 

For å få til dette trengs det bruk av moderne platformer som Azure, Microsoft 365 og PowerBI i bunn. Gjennom god dialog med interne og eksterne leverandører identifiseres og tilgjengeliggjøres viktige datakilder. 
Struktur, tilgjengelighet og normalisering er neste steg på bedriftens vei mot målet, og her er A2insight tett på bedriften. 
Vi støtter kundene i automatisering, budsjett- og prognosearbeid, tilfører muligheter for writeback til hovedsystemer og skreddersyr løsningene bedriften trenger for dashboards, automatiserte perioderapporter, balanserte målekort og KPIer. 
Avanserte løsninger knyttet til konsern- og selskapsrapportering kan forenkles og dyre verktøy kan elimineres. Å se fremover med analyser gir innsikt, muligheter for scenarier, samt datadrevet utforskning og strategiutvikling.

For å spre kompetansen og etablere løsningene ut i organisasjonene holder vi kurs i PowerBI.

Name: Dealert
Description:
Dealert is a global M&A deal intelligence platform designed to make access to transaction data fast, transparent, and affordable. It tracks thousands of mergers, acquisitions, and investments across all sectors and regions, empowering investors, advisors, consultants, and researchers to discover, analyze, and benchmark deals in seconds.

For too long, high-quality deal data has been locked behind expensive, enterprise-only platforms. These tools serve large institutions but leave smaller funds, independent advisors, and analysts without reliable access to the insights they need. Dealert was built to change that — to level the playing field by democratizing access to global deal information.

With Dealert, users can instantly explore who’s buying what, where, and for how much. The platform allows users to search and filter by sector, geography, acquirer, target, and transaction date, delivering structured, easy-to-understand results. It simplifies research that would otherwise require hours of manual searching and dozens of open tabs.

Dealert’s value lies in its clarity and accessibility. It removes complexity from M&A research, providing a clean interface, verified deal information, and an affordable way to stay informed about market movements. Whether you’re identifying acquisition trends, benchmarking valuation multiples, or studying consolidation in a specific sector, Dealert makes it effortless.

The platform was founded by Private Equity professionals who understand how fragmented and exclusive deal data can be. Their goal was simple: to create a tool that empowers users to make smarter, faster decisions — without needing institutional budgets or restrictive contracts.

Dealert serves the global community of investors, corporate development teams, consultants, and academics who rely on accurate, timely M&A data. It bridges the gap between traditional, costly databases and the next generation of transparent, user-first intelligence tools.

نطمح إلى أن نكون الوجهة الأولى لكل من يبحث عن تجربة سلسة واحترافية في عالم العقارات ومواد البناء. من خلال استراتيجيات تسويقية متطورة وعروض جذابة، نساعد عملاءنا على الوصول إلى أكبر قاعدة من المشترين والمستثمرين، مما يعزز من فرص نجاحهم ونمو أعمالهم.  

مع **Addvex**، أنت لا تبيع فقط، بل توسّع نطاق أعمالك، وتكتسب رؤية أوسع في السوق، وتستفيد من خدمات تسويقية مبتكرة تقودك نحو النجاح.

Name: Venture Planner
Description:
Venture Planner, the innovative brainchild of seasoned entrepreneurs, Alex Clansey and Nicola McKenzie is set to revolutionise the business planning landscape, with the launch of a new AI-driven platform in the UK. 

Targeted at start-ups, entrepreneurs, and ‘dreamers’, who harbour business aspirations, the software promises to transform the process of business planning by leveraging the incredible capabilities of the latest AI technology. This not only makes the process more efficient and accessible but also significantly increases the likelihood of success. Unlike traditional business planning tools, Venture Planner is built from the ground up around AI, setting it apart from competitors.

Venture Planner considers a vast spectrum of user-provided data points, along with the extensive information and knowledge its unique AI has been trained on, before providing insightful suggestions on every aspect of the new businesses strategy and crafting a comprehensive business plan. The platform eliminates the common hurdles encountered by entrepreneurs, such as self-doubt, not being familiar with business jargon, and uncertainty about where to start.

In the world of business, the fear of failure can be paralyzing, preventing may entrepreneurs from transforming their dreams into reality. However, Venture Planner, provides start-up's with a much clearer understanding of the marketplace, the potential challenges they may face, and the opportunities that lie ahead. This knowledge helps to boost confidence and reduce the fear of failure and increase the chance of success.

Financial forecasting, a cornerstone of any business plan, is fully automated. The production of income statements, balance sheets and cashflow forecasts is made effortless and precise. Whether a tech startup or a retail enterprise, Venture Planner adapts to diverse industries and business models and guarantees realistic and investor-ready financial projections.

• In-depth monthly downloads covering the world, APAC region and Taiwan, 
• Invitations to closed-door monthly forum sessions and events,
• Curated reports and analysis on thought leadership, organization success and savvy investing. 

In addition to 24/7 access to an online library providing comprehensive monthly reports, analysis and resources, TBLF Subscribers also enjoy complimentary access to the monthly Forum sessions which includes the monthly Economic and Geopolitical update, as well as an invited guest speaker for the month.

Since 2021, the organization of the monthly forum sessions has been undertaken by EBAT European Business Association in Taiwan, marking a partnership that strives to enhance delivery of quality content every month to TBLF subscribers.

Subscription is open to all nationalities as well as overseas-based applicants. 

For more information on the programme and subscription eligibility, as well as opportunities and partnership queries, please write to info@ebatw.org.

Description:
Aretetic Solutions | Ethical Technology for Community Insight, Research, and Governance

Aretetic Solutions designs and develops mission-driven software products that empower communities, support ethical research, and strengthen digital self-determination. Since 2017, we’ve built tools that combine regulatory-grade infrastructure with community-led design.

Our Core Products
DigitalCabinet
A consent-forward participant registration platform for clinical research, advocacy, and public health. Includes data collection, eConsent, permission tracking, and export-ready audit trails.

Trua
A platform for community-owned research and data governance. Trua enables groups to define how their data is collected, shared, and used supporting registries, cooperative ownership, and trusted stewardship.

Community-Driven Innovation (CDI)
Our proprietary participatory research method and toolkit. CDI translates lived experience into structured data models to prioritize research and community needs.

SoChoice (beta)
A values-centered collective decision-making tool using quadratic voting and computational social choice. SoChoice helps organizations allocate resources, make group decisions, and engage stakeholders more equitably.

Our Purpose
Aretetic is a product studio. Every line of code we write serves one goal: to empower people with tools they trust.

We work with researchers, institutions, governments, and community organizations who believe that data should serve people, not the other way around.

From data privacy and registry design to collective governance, our tools are made for real-world use where ethics, regulation, and equity intersect.

Name: Azonis
Description:
Au tournant du XIIIe siècle, Azon, célèbre glossateur formé à l'Université de Bologne, a joué un rôle essentiel dans la compréhension et la redécouverte des sources du droit.

Par ses gloses sur le Corpus Juris Civilis, il a structuré les sources romaines, transmis une méthode, et posé les bases de la science juridique médiévale. Il ne se contentait pas de commenter. Il expliquait, ordonnait, interprétait. Son œuvre a permis de faire parler le droit, dans toute sa complexité.

Aujourd’hui, Azonis reprend cette mission, avec un outil nouveau : une Intelligence Artificielle pensée pour les professionnels du droit, gouvernée, maîtrisée, et fidèle aux sources officielles. Nous avons conçu une IA qui s’appuie sur les textes officiels, et éclaire sur le droit français.

Comme les glossateurs hier, nous pensons que le droit mérite une approche intellectuelle exigeante.

Azonis, c'est une vision. Celle d’un droit plus lisible, plus structuré, plus accessible sans trahir sa complexité.
