Name: NESAI Health
Description:
NESAI emerges with the mission to empower aesthetic medicine clinics and medical professionals. It's a unique platform in the market that offers real-time, precise diagnoses, enhancing treatment safety and efficacy.

NESAI allows us to "listen beneath the skin" through the following diagnostics:
Silicone implant detection: Identify and assess the presence and integrity of silicone implants.

Hyaluronic acid filler detection: Accurately detect and evaluate hyaluronic acid-based fillers.
Skin photoaging measurement: Quantify the extent of skin photoaging to guide targeted treatment plans.

Cutaneous alteration assessment: Identify potential skin abnormalities early for timely intervention.

NESAI epitomizes safety with its 99% diagnostic accuracy. It effectively addresses potential adverse effects from previous treatments that could compromise patient health.

Utilizing NESAI prevents further adverse effects and provides medical professionals with a more precise roadmap for treatment.

The NESAI methodology is simple and straightforward, comprising three steps:

Image acquisition: Capture ultrasound images of the patient's skin.

NESAI platform access: Upload the captured images to the NESAI platform for analysis.

Real-time AI-powered diagnosis: Receive a personalized medical report with detailed findings.

Currently, NESAI offers three subscription plans tailored to enhance imaging diagnostics:

Basic: Ideal for clinics starting their journey with NESAI.

Pro: Designed for clinics seeking increased diagnostic capabilities.

Enterprise: Tailored for high-volume clinics with comprehensive diagnostic needs.

Explore our subscription plans and join the NESAI revolution: https://www.neshealth.com/en/

Details: https://www.neshealth.com/en/

Embrace the future of skin diagnosis with NESAI and elevate your patient care to new heights.

Name: BizForesight
Description:
BizForesight is an AI-powered business assessment that will guide business owners and generate dealflow for M&A professionals. Business owners will gain clarity about their company's value, how to increase its value, and their pathways to exit. They will then be matched with M&A professionals who will help them accomplish their goals.  

BizForesight is a collaboration between Talbot West, the leading provider of advanced AI solutions for mid-market, and Bill McCalpin of Capitalize Network. Bill is a legendary investment banker and exit advisor and the chair of the Alliance of Mergers & Acquisitions Advisors (AM&AA). 

We have the following moats:
1. Bill McCalpin's expertise. Bill is renowned in the M&A community and has been on both sides of the table over decades of M&A deals. His expertise is distilled and used to train our AI so that it delivers truly valuable advice and insights to business owners contemplating exit options. 
2. Proprietary deal data. Our AI is trained on thousands of real business deals, which makes it the most reliable valuation tool on the market. 
3. Advanced AI architecture. Instead of a single large language model, Talbot West's modular Cognitive Hive AI (CHAI) framework delivers a much more robust AI assessment and advisory experience. 
4. Our network. Bill's vast network of M&A professionals fuels the system. Initially, BizForesight will go live with 500 business owners taking the assessment. As we onboard professional services to handle the needs of this initial cohort, they will make the assessment available to their clients as a value-added resource.

BizForesight will be the single largest driver of dealflow in the M&A sector in 2026. If you are an investment bank, M&A law firm, corporate accounting firm, exit planner, or other M&A professional, reach out to learn how you can participate.

Learn more at https://bizforesight.com
Learn more about Talbot West at https://talbotwest.com

Description:

Pozyskana wiedza i umiejętności będą miały istotne znaczenie zarówno w działalności biznesowej, jak i naukowej. 
Studia podyplomowe są kierowane w szczególności do osób, które:

Our mission: turn water from a hidden risk into an accessible, measurable, and tradable asset.

AAW is building the first deeptech platform at the intersection of AgTech, ClimateTech, and FinTech, sectors with countercyclical dynamics, to assess what no one else has dared: the true value of water. Globally, and at a granular level.

With AAW, clients can:
 Develop ESG-aligned financial products using our proprietary water value indexes
 Optimize sustainable irrigation and water management
 Unlock double-digit productivity gains in agriculture
 Simulate past, present, and future water scenarios for smarter planning

Our platform is designed to become the global standard for water intelligence and risk management, paving the way toward the world’s first Global Water Exchange. This infrastructure will bring liquidity, transparency, and strategy to a multi-trillion-dollar market.

AAW was founded by Alfredo Bini, who spent over a decade documenting droughts and water-related investments worldwide as a photojournalist, building on his experience as an entrepreneur, business intelligence analyst, and derivatives trader.

We are not just building a platform.
We are shaping the future of water.

Name: Blowork
Description:
¿Qué es Blowork?

Blowork es una comunidad que busca unir a personas con inquietudes, ideas y ambición en el norte de la Comunidad Valenciana y sur de Cataluña. Nuestro objetivo es fomentar el networking, la innovación y el intercambio de conocimientos en un ambiente relajado y cercano, demostrando que no hace falta vivir en una gran ciudad para conectar, emprender y crear grandes cosas.

Nacemos con la idea de que las conexiones y las oportunidades no dependen del lugar, sino de las personas. Queremos construir un ecosistema que inspire y apoye a quienes, como nosotros, creen en el poder del talento y la colaboración.

¿Por qué Blowork?

>Esta zona es una comarca con una calidad de vida excepcional, pero que aún carece de un espacio donde los negocios, las ideas y el conocimiento fluyan. En los últimos años, hemos visto cómo cada vez más personas deciden mudarse de las grandes ciudades a lugares más pequeños buscando tranquilidad y mejores condiciones. Blowork quiere ser ese punto de encuentro que complemente la calidad de vida con una comunidad activa de personas emprendedoras, creativas y curiosas.


Nuestra visión

Crear un espacio donde los profesionales y empresarios locales puedan conectar y colaborar.

Atraer nuevas ideas y talento a la zona, promoviendo la innovación y el emprendimiento.

Generar un ecosistema que haga de esta ciudad un lugar más atractivo para vivir, trabajar y desarrollar proyectos.

¿Cómo lo queremos hacer?

Iniciamos con encuentros mensuales, el último miércoles de cada mes a las 19:15, en un ambiente informal, como bares o cafeterías.


Cada encuentro estará diseñado para:

Conectar: Conocer a personas de diferentes sectores y compartir ideas.

Aprender: Escuchar experiencias e historias inspiradoras de invitados y miembros de la comunidad.

Colaborar: Crear sinergias y oportunidades de negocio entre los asistentes.

Name: Voca Sport
Description:
Wie zijn wij?
Wij zijn Voca, het zzp-platform voor en door zzp’ers in de sport. Je werkt niet voor ons maar met ons en andere zzp'ers, dit maakt ons zo anders. We werken transparant. Alles is inzichtelijk en werken alleen met gekwalificeerde zzp’ers en sportscholen.

Wat doen jullie?
Voca is een platform waar zzp’ers en opdrachtgevers elkaar vinden en verbinden. Voca doet niet aan actieve bemiddeling. Het algoritme achter het platform verbindt de zzp’er met de opdrachtgever. Jij, als zzp’er, bepaalt je uurloon en onderhandelt zelf met de opdrachtgever de voorwaarden en condities van de opdracht. Zo ben en blijf jij zelf ondernemer. Als opdrachtgever heb je een directe lijn met de zzp’er. Zo weet je snel wanneer iemand beschikbaar is.

Waarom dit platform?
Het platform is geboren uit het idee en de overtuiging om meer transparantie te brengen in de huidige markt en eerlijker te delen. Onduidelijkheid over overeenkomsten en verborgen kosten worden door zzp en opdrachtgevers gezien als doorn in het oog. Daarnaast worden winsten oneerlijk verdeeld. De zzp’er ziet niks van de omzet noch waardestijging die aandeelhouders van bureaus en intermediairs realiseren. Wij vinden dat dit gedeeld moet worden tussen de bedenkers, oprichters en degene die het platform uiteindelijk succesvol maken: de zzp'ers!

Als opdrachtgevers wil je graag via één kanaal werken in plaats van met bijvoorbeeld twintig losse zzp’ers communiceren. De snelheid waarmee diensten opgevuld kunnen worden is de kracht van dit platform. De kwaliteit van zzp’ers willen we hooghouden door eisen te stellen aan de zzp’ers. Het gesloten platform maakt dat er gecontroleerd zzp’ers en opdrachtgevers worden toegelaten. Dit om de kwaliteit en tevredenheid hoog te houden. Door alleen met een app te werken kunnen we de kosten laag houden.

Neem gerust contact met ons op!

API from cryptocurrency exchanges and accounting software
Wallet Addresses
CSV Uploads
Manual Entries
The above is used to appropriately allocate and ascertain gains and/or losses incurred on Cryptocurrencies within a specified period of time, account for them appropriately, as well as compute the tax liabilities of the users while optimizing their taxes. The API of accounting software is used to connect the Chart of Account and automatically post transactions.

OUR BUSINESS GOAL
To establish Chainkeeping as the go-to global cryptocurrency reporting solution for cryptocurrency individual and corporate users,  starting with Nigeria and expanding into the the global market.

Name: Most Sustainable Workplace Index
Description:
Our mission is to provide every business with the insight and support they need to build a motivated, sustainable workplace.

Whichever way you look at it, sustainability should matter to business but there is a gap between good intentions, action and impact.

One of the biggest challenges in progressing sustainability and climate within organisations is overcoming the intention to action gap. Most companies undertake a combination of monitoring skills / training; undertaking employee engagement surveys and measuring environmental impact. Whilst these initiatives produce important information, they don’t provide any insight into the factors creating the ‘action gap’ and therefore what to do about it. 

The reality in many organisations is that what gets measured gets done so we created the ‘Most Sustainable Workplace Index’ to fill this important gap. It is a diagnostic that was developed from evidence-based psychology and provides insight into factors that support or frustrate motivation of the workforce to act on sustainability. 

The Index provides valuable insights into factors that either support or hinder workforce motivation for sustainability action. From a practical perspective, it helps to understand the 'action gap' on sustainability and inform strategy; plans for employee engagement; and training & development activities so they are more targeted and effective in building action.

Name: Matau.ai
Description:
Matau is an AI agent that empowers businesses to access and analyze data through simple conversations, without technical expertise. It integrates with existing data sources, allowing you to ask business questions in natural language and receive actionable answers with insightful explanations.

Matau is like having a data expert always by the side of the user, ready to answer any business question they have, without the need to hire a data scientist or analyst.

Here's how it works:

Integration: Matau seamlessly connects to the user's existing data sources, such as their e-commerce platform, marketing tools, and databases. It's as simple as installing an app or plugin.

Data Consolidation: Once integrated, Matau automatically pulls in all the data and combines it into a centralized, easy-to-understand format. No manual data wrangling required.

Conversational Interface: When the user has a business question, they can simply ask Matau using natural language, just like having a conversation with a colleague. For example, they can ask, "What were our top-selling products last month, and why?"

Actionable Insights: Matau uses advanced AI and machine learning to analyze the data and provide actionable answers to the user's questions. It not only gives the numbers but also explains the factors influencing those results.

Continuous Learning: The more the user interacts with Matau, the better it understands their business and can offer proactive insights and recommendations. It's like having a data expert that continuously learns and adapts to the user's needs.

With Matau, users can make data-driven decisions quickly and confidently, without getting bogged down in complex analytics or relying on scarce data resources. It empowers everyone in the organization, from sales to marketing to finance, to leverage data for better business outcomes.

Talofa lava, Kia orana, Noa’ia, Mauri, Mālō e lelei, Tālofa, Ni Sa Bula Vinaka, Fakaalofa lahi atu, Mālō ni & warm Pacific greetings!! 

PACIFIC BUSINESS WOMEN/ ASPIRING ENTREPRENEURS - INTRODUCING THE "INAILAU PACIFIC BUSINESS WOMEN'S NETWORK" 

This Network is for Pacific Business Women from Aotearoa New Zealand, Australia, USA, the Pacific Region, and any country around the globe to connect, network & find creative ways to support & encourage each other!! 

Our organization is dedicated to empowering and uplifting Pacific Women in the business and professional world.  We understand the unique challenges and triumphs that women entrepreneurs face, and we're here to provide a platform so you can find the support and connections you need to thrive.

“E au le inailau a tamaita’i”..... This saying is adapted from an old Samoan saying “e au le inailau a tamaitai " which comes from a story about a group of women who finished thatching the roof of a fale before the men. This saying speaks to the strong work ethic of women and determination to achieve what they set out to do 

"She considers a field and buys it; out of her earnings she plants a vineyard. She sets about her work vigorously; her arms are strong for her tasks. She sees that her trading is profitable, and her lamp does not go out at night."Prov 31:16-18 NIV  

Does this Samoan proverb & scripture speak to who you as a Pacific Business Woman/ Entrepreneur? 

We believe this proverb and scripture epitomises who we are as Pacific women, who choose to take the pathway of business & entrepreneurship - a way to fulfill our dreams and aspirations for ourselves, our families, our communities..... and reach our full potential as Pacific women, as Godly women, as modern day Warrior women!! 

We run online & in-person events, and provide useful information for Pacific Business women and entrepreneurs.  Please FOLLOW US & SHARE this page with your Pacific business women friends and family

Utilius è l'esito della visione innovativa di Bonaventura Suriano, che ha riconosciuto l'esigenza di un approccio rivoluzionario al controllo di gestione per la microimpresa. Creata per trasformare i dati finanziari in informazioni azionabili, Utilius combina la precisione dell'intelligenza artificiale con la semplicità di una piattaforma cloud, offrendo agli imprenditori un sistema di gestione finanziaria senza precedenti.

Ideata da Bonaventura Suriano, Utilius si avvale del Metodo dei 6 KPI, una strategia distintiva che analizza Ricavi, Costi Variabili, Margine di Contribuzione, Costi Fissi, Punto di Pareggio e Ebitda per fornire un quadro chiaro e comprensibile della salute aziendale. Questo metodo permette agli imprenditori di prendere decisioni basate su dati concreti, massimizzando l'efficacia della loro gestione finanziaria.

La missione di Utilius è quella di democratizzare il controllo di gestione, rendendolo accessibile a tutte le microimprese, indipendentemente dalla loro familiarità con i concetti finanziari. La piattaforma, progettata per essere intuitiva e user-friendly, si collega direttamente al cassetto fiscale dell'azienda, automatizzando il processo di raccolta dati e garantendo analisi aggiornate e precise.

Bonaventura Suriano, con la sua expertise e dedizione, ha reso possibile per gli imprenditori non solo comprendere ma anche agire sui loro dati finanziari, trasformando le sfide in opportunità di crescita. Utilius rappresenta non solo uno strumento di gestione ma una vera e propria filosofia imprenditoriale, che pone la conoscenza e l'analisi al centro della strategia aziendale.

Scopri come Utilius e il Metodo dei 6 KPI di Bonaventura Suriano possono rivoluzionare la tua gestione finanziaria, portando la tua azienda verso nuovi orizzonti di successo.

Name: HappyGo
Description:
Bij HappyGo geloven we dat het plannen van kampen voor je kinderen net zo leuk en zorgeloos zou moeten zijn als de kampervaring zelf. 

Wat doen we?
Wij zijn jouw one-stop-shop voor het zoeken, plannen en (op termijn) boeken van kampen voor kinderen. Of je nu op zoek bent naar een zomerkamp vol avontuur, een creatieve herfstactiviteit of gewoon een plek waar je kind nieuwe vrienden maakt, bij HappyGo vind je het allemaal. Met onze slimme tools maak je moeiteloos een planning, plan je samen met vriendjes en houd je overzicht over alle vakanties in één handige kalender. Bye bye, eindeloze WhatsApp-groepen en last-minute stress!

Waarom HappyGo?
Omdat ouders het al druk genoeg hebben, maken wij het makkelijk. Bij HappyGo brengen we een zorgvuldig samengesteld aanbod van kampen samen op één plek, met betrouwbare info en een vleugje magie. En met het HappyGo Label weet je zeker dat je kampen vindt met up-to-date en gecontroleerde gegevens. Kortom: zorgeloos plannen, plezier gegarandeerd!

Voor ouders, door ouders.
Wij begrijpen jouw uitdagingen, want we zijn zelf ook ouders. Daarom bouwen we een community van gelijkgestemde ouders die net als jij het beste voor hun kinderen willen. Samen maken we kampplanning leuker, slimmer en vooral makkelijker.

Klaar om HappyGo te ontdekken? Sluit je aan en ervaar de nieuwe manier van kampplanning – voor een leven vol avontuur, seizoen na seizoen!

Name: GRAVOmer
Description:
GRAVOmer. Intelligent surface technology network. Das branchenübergreifende Kompetenznetzwerk für innovative funktionale Oberflächentechnologien. 

Produktoberflächen können viel mehr als nur gut aussehen – spezielle Veredelungen und Strukturierungen geben ihnen Funktionen wie z. B. mechanischen Schutz, Schmutzabweisung oder Biokompatibilität für Anwendungen in nahezu allen Branchen vom Geräte- und Maschinenbau über Optik und Verkehrswesen bis zu Architektur oder Verpackungsindustrie.
 
Die Herstellung funktionaler Oberflächen erfordert das definierte Zusammenspiel von Veredelungstechnologien und Materialeigenschaften – eine Querschnittstechnologie für echte Innovationssprünge. GRAVOmer koordiniert Aktivitäten zur anwendungsbezogenen Entwicklung von intelligenten Funktionen für Oberflächen, um sie in innovative, marktreife Produkte zu überführen.
 
Als branchenübergreifendes Netzwerk verknüpft GRAVOmer die Expertise und Ressourcen von Technologie-, Materialentwicklern und Maschinenbauern mit den Anwendungspotenzialen von Produktherstellern in nachhaltigen Kooperationen entlang von Wertschöpfungsketten. Ziel ist die anwendungsbezogene und industrietaugliche Entwicklung und Umsetzung von innovativen Oberflächenfunktionen und der dafür notwendigen Herstellungsverfahren. Seit Juni 2020 ist der GRAVOmer e.V. Träger des Netzwerks. 

Viele Partner aus Industrie und Forschung gehören bereits zum Kompetenzcluster von GRAVOmer. Kontaktieren Sie uns, wenn Sie Interesse an bzw. Fragen zu funktionalen Oberflächen haben oder wenn Sie auch zum GRAVOmer-Netzwerk dazugehören möchten!
 
In einem durch das Bundesministerium für Forschung, Technologie und Raumfahrt geförderten WIR!-Projekt entwickeln wir Mitteldeutschland, unsere Heimatregion, zu einer Kompetenzregion für mikrostrukturierte Funktionsoberflächen.

Name: Adapt
Description:
About Adapt
Uniting Visions, Expanding Horizons – Adapt is a platform designed to connect global startups with Japan’s innovation ecosystem, fostering collaboration that transcends borders. We bridge the gap between international entrepreneurs and Japanese businesses, creating opportunities to co-create solutions that address challenges both in Japan and around the world.

Japan’s innovation ecosystem, while rich in potential, often remains difficult for outsiders to access due to its insular structure. Many international startups face challenges in navigating this unique environment, from building local networks to understanding cultural nuances. At the same time, Japanese entrepreneurs often struggle to adapt their business models to global markets.

At Adapt, we tackle these challenges by moving From Isolation to Collaboration: Unlocking Global Potential. Our mission is to empower startups by making Japan’s ecosystem more visible, accessible, and collaborative. By providing international entrepreneurs with the tools and connections they need to succeed, and by equipping Japanese startups with global perspectives, we aim to transform innovation ecosystems on both sides.

Our core initiatives include:
・Ecosystem Visibility: Mapping key players such as VCs, investors, corporates, and entrepreneurial talent to make Japan’s innovation landscape navigable.
・Meaningful Connections: Organizing events and leveraging digital platforms to foster genuine relationships and partnerships.
・Mutual Growth: Creating spaces for startups to exchange ideas, overcome challenges, and drive impactful innovation.

Through these efforts, we are Empowering Startups, Transforming Ecosystems – building a future where innovation knows no borders.

Join us in shaping a connected, global innovation community.

Name: teamdecoder
Description:
What core problem does teamdecoder aim to solve for organisations?

teamdecoder addresses the pervasive issue of teams struggling with constant change, particularly the shift towards hybrid human-AI collaboration. The core problem is that existing methods for defining roles and responsibilities (such as static org charts, Miro boards, or job descriptions) are insufficient. They are often out of date, incomplete, or ignored, leading to widespread chaos, increased stress, and a significant failure to execute strategic initiatives effectively.


What are the key features of the teamdecoder SaaS platform?

The teamdecoder SaaS platform offers a suite of tools designed to manage team clarity and change. Key features include a Role Dashboard for visualising responsibilities, an FTE Workload Planner for managing capacity, and Alignment Workflows to guide teams through reorganisation. It also includes a Purpose Tree for clarifying team objectives, a Compare Mode for analysis, and Wellbeing Surveys to track team health. The Hybrid Team Planner supports the design of new collaboration models, and the Campfire Process provides a recurring ritual for clarity maintenance. Additionally, teamdecoder offers Enterprise Onboarding and a Consultant Kickback Program.


Who are teamdecoder's ideal customers and how is the product typically onboarded?

teamdecoder targets two primary customer segments: Organisational Development Consultants who support multiple teams undergoing change, and Team Leads managing groups of 8 to 50 people who regularly face restructuring pressure. Onboarding varies depending on the customer type: self-serve users benefit from guided in-app onboarding, consultants receive personal training directly from CEO Kai, and enterprise clients undergo workshop-led onboarding before transitioning to an internal administrator. Support is available via teamdecoder.tawk.help.

What sets us apart is our deep understanding of the challenges faced by small furniture manufacturers. Name: High Ticket
Description:
We help high-ticket businesses transition their sales operations to the blockchain to maximize their growth and profits.

High ticket business operations could be revolutionized by blockchain technology. Industry leaders predict that it will impact every major area of work, and the shift is already underway. Transactions are tracked from beginning to end automatically, without the need for a centralized authority to preserve or encrypt the data. Instead, blockchain makes transaction history transparent by compartmentalizing them. Furthermore, blockchains are unchangeable, which means their information is secure.

Cryptocurrency transactions function on the blockchain backbone, and the technology is becoming more and more prevalent across our personal and professional lives. A few other applications include filing insurance claims, tracking environmental, social, and corporate governance, controlling air traffic for drones, and enhancing foreign exchange transactions. For businesses willing to embrace technology, it is a brave new world full of infinite possibilities.

More time on the business, means less time spent on data processing and admin, happier staff, a more profitable, streamlined company and it also reduces carbon emissions.

So instead of you  doing all of those time consuming administrative tasks, a software robot  does it automatically with very little or no interaction from yourself. Once the intelligent bot is developed and launched it then runs and delivers 24/7/365 and is continuously managed and supported by us. This is our RPA as a Service (RPAaas).

And if you were to automate one manual process that takes a person 1 hour to do every day on their computer, that will save approximately 22kg of CO2 a year. That's the CO2e (e=equivalent) of planting 1 tree!  Imagine what you can do with automating 2, 3, 5+ hours of processes.

Get In Touch with us at rpa@autonomate.io or chat with our bot at www.autonomate.io and we can go through how we can help maximise the automation in your business.

Flexbi olarak, iş zekası ve raporlama alanında geniş bir uzmanlık ve deneyime sahibiz. Müşterilerimizin karmaşık veri setlerini analiz eder, bilgileri görsel ve anlaşılır raporlar haline getirir ve bu sayede işletmelerinin karar alma süreçlerini iyileştirmelerine yardımcı oluruz.

Uzman ekibimiz, iş zekası ve raporlama konusundaki en son teknolojileri ve trendleri yakından takip eder. Bu sayede müşterilerimize en güncel ve yenilikçi çözümleri sunarız. Esnek ve özelleştirilebilir bir yaklaşım benimseyerek, her müşterinin benzersiz ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için çözümlerimizi uyarlar ve özelleştiririz.

Vizyonumuz, iş zekası ve raporlama alanında inovasyon ve mükemmelliği teşvik etmek ve müşterilerimize rekabet avantajı sağlamaktır. Sürekli olarak gelişen teknolojileri takip ediyor ve en son analitik yöntemleri kullanarak müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmayı hedefliyoruz.

Müşteri memnuniyeti bizim için en önemli önceliktir. Flexbi olarak, müşterilerimizin başarısını kendi başarımız olarak görüyoruz ve iş birliği içinde çalışarak işletmelerinin potansiyelini maksimize etmek için el ele çalışıyoruz.

Name: International Conference ITS 2026 “Intelligent Green Mobility and Resilience Society”
Description:
The International Conference ITS 2026: “Intelligent Green Mobility and Resilience Society” is organized by the University of Patras, Department of Civil Engineering, on 12-13 November 2026, in the Conference and Cultural Center of the University of Patras, Greece. 
Connected and Resilient Intelligent Transportation Systems are key elements in the roadmap towards the empowerment of the mobile citizen in decision making. This is founded in reshaped holistic understanding and the optimal interpretation of values and situations involving people, objects, and vehicles for drastically improved mobility, safety and resilience.  Intelligent Green Mobility Systems further enhance this vision by integrating sustainable energy solutions and adaptive technologies that minimize environmental impact while maximizing transport efficiency and improving quality of life.
Implementation of ITS and C-ITS in Resilience Society will address challenges in their application in predictive demand-supply transport, data management, AI integration, cybersecurity, intermodal mobility, traffic networks, vehicle & system autonomy, safety & security, decision analysis, location optimisation, communications, intelligent information, intelligent management, unmanned aerial vehicles, green mobility, micromobility, mobility as a service, logistics optimisation, environmental impacts, and the associated policies and policy dialogue. 
The ITS Conference is an opportunity for industry, public organizations, local government and authorities, universities, researchers, consultants, constructors and freelancers to exchange views on arising problems and solutions, including policies. 
The Conference distinguishes itself by integrating resilience, connectivity, and sustainability into a single holistic framework that unites technological innovation (ITS and C-ITS), green mobility, and human-centred decision empowerment—linking technical, environmental, and policy dimensions across all transport modes.

Name: Intelligent Life
Description:
We're a New Zealand-based Insurtech specialising in auto-underwriting solutions for life & health insurance companies. 
  
What we do.
  
Using our auto-underwriting software, it takes just minutes to complete a digital insurance application and be offered competitively-priced, fully-underwritten insurance cover, online.  No medical exam. No paper. Just an instant decision, enabling individuals to purchase cover immediately. Our software isn't just for individuals buying insurance. Our software also powers ‘point-of-sale’ solutions for insurance agents, helping them sell insurance products quickly and effectively.  

Our auto-underwriting Engine.

The cornerstone of our insurance software is our auto-underwriting rules engine. Underwriting rules can be quickly and easily configured to auto-decision life, critical illness, disability, income protection and health products to meet the specific needs and underwriting philosophy of any insurer. Our rules engine is also available as a ‘self-contained’ module, which can be integrated into an insurer’s own online sales process. For some markets, we’ll connect our engine with third-party resources such as prescription databases, motor vehicle records, credit scores and prior insurance disclosures (MIB), to enhance real-time decisioning.  

Five reasons insurance companies use our auto-underwriting engine.

  1. To reach younger consumers through digital channels 
  2. To empower Insurance Agents with Point-of-sale solutions
  3. To reduce their acquisition costs
  4. To improve their underwriting outcomes and compliance
  5. To gain business insights through data analytics

We help insurance companies achieve these strategies quickly, cost effectively, with lower risk and better outcomes. 
 
Where we operate:

We've rolled out platforms selling life and health insurance online in Australia, New Zealand, Malaysia, Singapore, China, Hong Kong, South Africa and USA.

PROBLEMA PE CARE O REZOLVĂ SMARTreports
În România, există un volum mare de date economice publice, dar sunt fragmentate, incomparabile, greu accesibile ca baze de date, ceea ce le face de analizat. Managerii, investitorii, consultanții sau jurnaliștii pierd ore, zile sau chiar săptămâni pentru a aduna, pregăti și analiza informații dispersate din multiple surse: ANAF, RECOM, INS, BNR, Monitorul Oficial.

Atlasul interactiv al business-ului românesc - ediția 2025 este primul produs digital de informare din ecosistemul SMARTreports powered by BRIDGE-to-INFORMATION și marchează debutul unei noi ere pe zona de Business Intelligence și analiza de date în România.

Atlasul interactiv al business-ului românesc oferă o privire panoramică a business-ului românesc și, în același timp, permite o radiografie aprofundată a diverselor componente ale economiei românești, pornind de la informațiile financiare detaliate a peste 1.000.000 de companii, segmentate pe multiple criterii, cu o perspectivă temporală cuprinzătoare din 2018 până în 2024, actualizată lunar pentru a reflecta cea mai recentă realitate economică.

Name: Tribexa

YOUR NEXT-LEVEL ENTERPRISE ECOSYSTEM.
Tribexa manages the precision required when raising funds — from version-tracking all your marketing, to coordinating signatures, to working as your registered transfer agent. All without leaving your custom, secure platform.

But raising capital is the starting line, not the end point. Tribexa connects all of your stakeholders in a powerful enterprise ecosystem, enabling a better, more efficient, transparent and cost-effective way of working.

THE PRESSING NEED FOR A SOLUTION
The world traditionally conducted business with siloed management processes—from contract versioning and e-signing, to maintaining institutional knowledge and finance. It’s been well known that the lack of integration and coordination caused duplication of efforts and gaps in knowledge. There were also untold points of potential failure, perhaps a step that required a lawyer’s document—but she was on vacation. The entire approach, cobbled together over decades, exposed enterprises to significant risk.

THE VALUE OF TRIBEXA
Tribexa manages the wide constellation of foundational business needs, streamlining management across one’s entire enterprise ecosystem while maintaining the entity’s “single source of truth.” Tribexa is holistic, intuitive and secure, paying for itself from day one in both time and effort, plus the mitigation of risk. Pricing is simple as it’s based on the number of legal entities and information maintained. Plus, implementation is intuitive and easy, with APIs  and simple drag-and-drop integration with existing data and files.

WHAT TRIBEXA INCLUDES
Tribexa’s proprietary platform provides flexible, white-labeled, turnkey business ecosystem management:
 * FUNDRAISING AND CAPITAL MANAGEMENT
    - Fundraising, cap table management, SEC reg. transfer agent, investor portal
 * OPERATIONS FACILITATION
    -  Governance, finance, HR, IR, CRM
 * CONTRACT AND DOCUMENT PROCESSES
 * COMMUNICATION AND COORDINATION

The number one risk for Managed Service Provider is becoming a faceless business to their customers.

If MSPs aren’t regularly having conversations with their customers about the opportunities for their business and helping their customers grow their revenues, solve business problems, or reduce cost – then they’re a faceless supplier and at risk of being commoditized and replaced with the lowest bidder.   

That's why we created the GetInSync platform to help MSPs differentiate themselves from the competition by helping their customers solve business problems not fix IT issues.

HOW WE DO IT:
We know from our 30-years of MSP experience how difficult it is to gain access to the C-suite executives.  Using our GetInSync framework and SaaS platform, we guide the MSP through 3 simple steps that takes them from the server room to the boardroom. 

First, you learn the GetInSync method, second we jointly onboard your client, and third we dial in your fractional Chief Executive Officer processes and skills.   Our Do-It-With-You approach guarantees success or your money back.    

WHAT YOU GET:
* a 2-week jump start, Master Builder GetInSync training course 
* 12 hours of live coaching calls
* full access to our LMS and case study workbook
* a subscription to the GetInSync software for internal use  
* a fully loaded sales demonstration workspace with matching sales scripts and PowerPoint slides to present GetInSync to your customers.  
* co-branded ‘leave behind’ marketing materials including web infographics, LinkedIn ready posts and a 6-month email campaign.   
* unlimited, real-time access to our customer success team to smoothly onboard clients
* new monthly revenue stream

THE OUTCOME:
Differentiate your MSP from your competition.  The GetInSync framework enables you to confidently help business leaders target key business areas and focus on your customer's digital transformation.

Collaborative Business Planning (CBP) harnesses this approach to create dynamic, highly visual business models that streamline resource planning, optimize costs, and drive process improvements. These models lay the foundation for building a Digital Twin of an Organization (DTO), enabling businesses to mirror their operations in a virtual environment.

With CBP-DTO models, teams can map operational workflows, anticipate bottlenecks, and simulate the effects of changing product or service demands and operational efficiencies on both fixed and variable costs. These tools empower organizations to collaboratively explore "what-if" scenarios, providing actionable insights into operational and financial outcomes across the entire enterprise.

"BOOM REVOLUTION is dedicated to fostering positive change in Africa by providing mentorship and support to young Africans. Our mission is to empower the next generation with access to global opportunities, including scholarships, fellowships, jobs, and training."

Vision:
"Our vision is to build a thriving Africa where knowledge transfer and mentorship are at the heart of progress. We aspire to see a continent where accomplished individuals actively engage in mentoring and knowledge-sharing, ensuring that no talented young person is left behind due to a lack of guidance or access to opportunities."

Goals:

Empowerment through Mentorship: To connect experienced professionals with young Africans, providing them with guidance, support, and mentorship to help them achieve their full potential.

Access to Opportunities: To create a platform that facilitates access to scholarships, fellowships, job placements, and training programs on a global scale, enabling young Africans to broaden their horizons.

Knowledge Transfer: To encourage knowledge-sharing and collaboration among successful individuals, ensuring that the wisdom and expertise of today's leaders benefit the leaders of tomorrow.

Alleviate Joblessness: To contribute to the reduction of unemployment in Africa by equipping young people with the skills, confidence, and opportunities they need to secure meaningful employment.

Inclusivity: To make mentorship and opportunities accessible to all, regardless of their socioeconomic background, ensuring that no talented individual is left behind.

By focusing on these mission, vision, and goals, BOOM REVOLUTION aims to play a pivotal role in building a brighter future for Africa, where the potential of its youth is unlocked, and the continent thrives through mentorship and access to opportunities.

Name: The Culture Think Tank
Description:
The Culture Think Tank is a SaaS product development company. We specialize in Behavioral Intelligence. Our solutions leverage Behavioral Intelligence to provide leaders the hard numbers they need to measure and improve company culture, drive operating performance, and quantify return on workforce investments.

The founders created The Culture Think Tank because we believe in company culture. We believe company culture drives operating performance; and we know most companies struggle to develop and sustain high performing company cultures. In 2021, 84% of executives reported struggling with their company culture.

This struggle is one all the founders faced. Throughout our careers, we all struggled to measure and justify the value of company culture, workplace alignment, and team dynamics. It is this common struggle that brought us together and is how The Culture Think Tank got its name.

In 2020, the four original founders decided it was time to finally define the hard numbers needed to quantify the importance of company culture and provide the metric to measure return on culture.

We assembled a think tank of experts that included NY Times Best Selling Authors, PhDs, HR Professionals, and seasoned leaders to tackle this need. The outcome of our efforts was the Culture Five, which provides the five metrics leaders need to measure, monitor, and improve their company’s culture and workplace well-being.

Utilizing Behavioral Intelligence, the Culture Five calculates a company’s culture and workplace metrics with only a three (3) question poll, which we call a check-in because people don’t like to be polled.

Our efforts continue to expand. We are actively developing an algorithm to measure the importance and impact a company’s values has on culture and workplace performance; and we are launching a new study to quantify the metrics of a winning team culture for youth athletics in partnership with a think tank of youth sports academies and professional athletes.

وقد حرصنا على انتقاء الخبراء ذات الكفاءات العالية، كما أنها كرست جُلَّ اهتمامها لتطوير تلك الكوادر بصفة مستمرة من خلال الدورات التدريبية والتأهيلية المتخصصة، حيث يتمتع فريق عمل الخط المستقبلي بخبرات واسعة في مختلف التقنيات الحديثة التي تسهل لعملائنا في التطوير واتخاذ القرار للتحسين والتقدم، وقد توسعت أنشطة وخدماتنا وقاعدة عملائها خلال الفترة الماضية بشكل ملحوظ، الأمر الذي حتم على خبراء الخط المستقبلي توسيع تواجدها ليشمل مناطق مختلفة بالمملكة.
وفي سعي دؤوب نحو التميز أخذت الخط المستقبلي على عاتقها بناء علاقات استراتيجية متينة مع عملائها واكتساب ثقتهم من خلال التزامها ومصداقيتها بتزويدهم بالحلول الأمثل تقنياً واقتصاديا

Suppliers get unprecedented transparency into the buyer's selection process and post-purchase feedback. 

Intermediaries and consultants can take over RFX purchasing projects in a controlled and secure way, delivering higher service quality and providing value-added insights based on the information obtained across many purchases.

Name: Assessment Labs
Description:
AI-Powered Behavioural Risk & Integrity Assessments for Fraud Prevention

At Assessment Labs, we are transforming how organisations evaluate clients and leaders by bringing behavioural science into fraud detection, credit risk, and ethical decision-making. Our mission is ambitious: to help organisations — including banks, fintechs, and microcredit institutions — reduce fraud and default by providing AI-powered, behaviourally informed assessments that reveal hidden risk factors traditional tools often miss.

We believe organisations and financial systems thrive when they can trust the people they engage with — whether as clients, borrowers, or leaders. That’s why our assessments go beyond technical competence to measure integrity, trustworthiness, and behavioural risk, enabling institutions to prevent fraud before it happens.

 Our Mission
To empower organisations to make faster, more accurate, and ethical decisions about clients and leaders by combining AI-driven insights with decades of behavioural science expertise.

 Our Vision
Ecosystems where fraud prevention, transparency, and integrity are the norm — not the exception.

 Who We Are
Founded by experts in neuroscience, applied psychology, behavioural sciences, computer science, and AI, Assessment Labs brings decades of global experience in leadership and risk assessment. Our team has worked with organisations such as Bain Capital, HSBC, Unilever, the United Nations, and McKinsey.

By merging the rigor of traditional behavioural assessments with the scalability of AI, we deliver an innovative, cost-effective solution that helps organisations —  including banks, fintechs, and microcredit providers —  reduce fraud, minimise default, and strengthen trust.

Recently recognised among the top 10% at Latitud and accepted into the very first cohort of the AI Founder Sprint of INSEAD’s AI Venture Lab, we are scaling this vision globally.

Description:
A lot of “end-to-end” tools are really only “end-to-end” for either your Front-Office or Back-Office requirements. Timewize is the Unified Business Management & Service Delivery Platform that does both.

Manage your professional services firm's business operations and bid-to-bill processes - with all the best information and without the back-office administration.

Timewize uses simple, distributed data collection to provide a single source of truth using real-time data. As an employee self-service platform with a universal licencing arrangement, TImewize allows a common system to be used by all elements of the business: delivery resources, operations management, administration, and finance. Data entry occurs as part of each element's standard business processes, but is reused to generate insights across the company. For example, as operations staff enter details of new opportunities, the financial year forecast is automatically updated. Similarly, as delivery resources enter timesheet information, operations staff can track actual performance against forecasts at the project and overall company level. 

Reduce errors otherwise incurred by managing information in multiple documents and systems, and increase profits through more informed decision-making driven by tried and tested industry-specific analytics and calculators.

Name: OSINTelligent
Description:
OSINTelligent was created by veterans who grew tired of the headlines reflecting our inability to protect and defend this great country. It was unacceptable!  There was no way we should be losing the cyberwar with all of the amazing trained certified talent, security tools, and services invested in cyber and network security. 

It just didn't add up, so the mission became finding the most common access point used in most cyber attacks.   

We found out the forward security perimeter was not monitored and undetectable by over 100 security tools and risk rating systems. 

The Cold Truth:
Cybercriminals are attacking us through social media and email to reach our higher-profile relationships as juicy targets with access to client-facing business sites and life-sustaining systems by exploiting the hidden layer.  It's flashing like a motel vacancy sign to come hack our financial   telecom  medical   energy  land water  sectors. 

Cybercriminals were getting in by exploiting insecure internet domains, abandoned cloud servers, and overlooked assets left behind after market launches or old development projects.

There is no one to blame because the technical teams and security tool vendors were never responsible for guarding anything outside of the firewall to the endpoints.  

Our Mission Essential Task List:
- We can't stop cyberwar adversaries from scanning business internet domains for vulnerabilities.

- We can discover, disrupt, and disable outside hidden-layer access points then block any traffic to a known cyberwar adversary.


Call to Action:
Subscribe to "Cyber Defense Now" for your  layman's guide to fighting back against the next generation of AI cyber attacks without breaking the bank. 

A veteran's oath never expires to protect and defend this great country.  
We’ve got your six.

Name: BIDSAdvantage
Description:
BIDS (Bid Identification and Development Services) is a Canadian innovation that helps businesses navigate and win in the public procurement space. By combining a smart, data-driven platform with expert consulting support, BIDS empowers small and medium enterprises, Indigenous-owned companies, and specialized suppliers to compete and succeed in government contracting.

For too long, the procurement process has favoured entrenched firms with insider knowledge, costly consultants, and long-standing lobbyists. BIDS changes this by filtering thousands of opportunities to find only the most relevant and winnable bids, then guiding clients in developing strong, compliant, and competitive proposals. Users can access an interactive map showing current tenders, regional spending trends, Indigenous partnership opportunities, and historical contract awards. The platform produces first-draft responses, creates compliance checklists, and offers insights into competitors, past winners, and upcoming rebids.

BIDS is led by co-founders Mike Hewitt and Murray Dawes, both with extensive operational and proposal experience in defence, water infrastructure, and remote logistics. Together, they have helped secure more than 12 billion dollars in federal contracts, including for the Future Aircrew Training program, CFS Alert, and the North Warning System. Their backgrounds include supporting NATO operations, Indigenous engagement, and major projects in Afghanistan, Ukraine, Africa, and the Caribbean. They understand what it takes to win in complex, high-stakes environments.

BIDS is designed and built in Canada for Canadian business. Our pricing is accessible to smaller firms, and our tools are purpose-built for Canadian rules, including bilingual requirements and the Procurement Strategy for Indigenous Business. With BIDS, you get the tools, intelligence, and support to pursue opportunities confidently and compete on equal ground.

Bid smarter. Win more. Lead with intelligence.

Thynk Forward enables businesses to capture, organize, and analyze conversational data from various communication channels, including phone, email, text, and video. In today’s regulatory environment, businesses must ensure that their data handling processes comply with consumer data privacy laws. SCITT technology provides an essential layer of security and compliance, offering immutable, cryptographically verifiable records of all communications.

The collaboration of Agentic AI, vCons and SCITT now equips businesses with a comprehensive solution that enhances speed, security, compliance, and efficiency in customer communications. This first-of-its-kind technology is not only a breakthrough in conversational AI but also sets a new standard for how businesses make customer interactions secure, scalable, and transparent. 

As market trends favor advanced AI solutions, Thynk Forward’s pioneering
integration positions it at the forefront of this exciting growth.

Fonctionnalités clés :

> Alertes personnalisées en continu : Recevez des notifications anticipées pour chaque événement contractuel important (remise de rapports, comités de suivi, investissements, indexation des tarifs), garantissant une gestion proactive.

> Analyse annuelle des indicateurs : Bénéficiez d'un reporting détaillé avec des ratios financiers et techniques sur mesure, vous permettant d'évaluer la santé et l'évolution de votre service ou projet.

> Assistance experte en continu : Accédez à l'expertise d'une équipe dédiée, composée de professionnels du droit public, de la modélisation financière et de la gestion de projets publics, pour répondre à toutes vos questions et besoins.

Pourquoi choisir Qester ?

La gestion des contrats publics est souvent complexe et chronophage. Les obligations multiples, les exigences de reporting et les enjeux financiers nécessitent une attention constante. Qester simplifie ce processus en offrant une solution centralisée, intuitive et soutenue par des experts, permettant ainsi aux collectivités de se concentrer sur leurs missions essentielles tout en assurant une gestion rigoureuse de leurs engagements contractuels.

Avec Qester, transformez la complexité en clarté et optimisez le suivi de vos contrats publics.

Description:
사업 운영자금 누수 방지 서비스, 세무특공대

사업을 하다 보면 예상치 못한 곳에서 돈이 새어나갑니다. 자금 흐름을 명확하게 관리하지 않으면 불필요한 지출이 늘어나고, 세금 부담도 커질 수밖에 없습니다. 세무특공대는 데이터를 기반으로 기업의 운영 자금을 체계적으로 관리하고, 누수를 방지할 수 있도록 돕는 법인 맞춤형 자금 관리 솔루션입니다.

 세무특공대가 제공하는 서비스
 법인 계좌 통합 조회 – 모든 은행 계좌를 한눈에 확인하고, 실시간 자금 흐름을 쉽게 파악할 수 있습니다.
 세금·경영 데이터 자동 분석 – 세금계산서, 카드 매출, 현금영수증 등 모든 거래 데이터를 자동으로 수집하고 정리합니다.
 지출·매출 분석 및 손익 계산 – 사업 운영에 필요한 주요 데이터를 실시간으로 분석하여, 수익과 비용을 효과적으로 관리할 수 있습니다.
 급여·4대보험 자동 정산 – 급여 계산과 4대보험 신고를 간편하게 처리하여 업무 부담을 줄여줍니다.
 부가세 예상 계산 – 부가세 납부액을 미리 계산하여 자금 계획을 세우는 데 도움을 줍니다.

 이런 고민이 있다면 세무특공대가 답입니다!
 사업 운영 자금이 예상보다 빨리 줄어든다? → 어디서 새고 있는지 데이터로 분석해드립니다.
 급여 지급, 부가세 납부, 비용 관리가 번거롭다? → 자동화된 분석으로 업무를 쉽게 처리할 수 있습니다.
 자금 관리를 잘못해 예상보다 많은 세금을 내고 있다? → 미리 리스크를 분석하고, 최적의 세무 관리를 도와드립니다.

 데이터를 활용한 스마트한 경영 관리
세무특공대는 단순한 세무·회계 서비스가 아닙니다. 기업 운영 자금을 효과적으로 관리할 수 있도록 돕는 데이터 기반 솔루션입니다.
자금 흐름을 한눈에 파악하고, 불필요한 지출을 줄이며, 예측 가능한 경영을 할 수 있도록 지원합니다.

 이런 기업에 꼭 필요합니다!
 스타트업부터 중소·중견기업까지, 자금 관리를 체계적으로 하고 싶은 법인이라면 세무특공대와 함께하세요.
우리는 데이터를 활용해 자금 손실 사각지대를 없애고, 기업이 지속적으로 성장할 수 있도록 최적의 경영 관리 솔루션을 제공합니다.

Name: Ordian MI
Description:
Ordian MI (Marketplace Intelligence) identifies the scams, frauds and incentives that enable the flow of products in the Gray Market. Our expert team takes you right to the source of the issue, delivering a 10-20x ROI. 

Even the most successful Brands struggle with disruption caused by Unauthorized Resellers. Our proven process uses a combination of Serial Tracking, Mystery Test Buying and Machine Learning algorithms to connect all the dots to stop Gray Market issues at the source: 

UNDERSTAND – Get visibility of Gray Market activity impacting your brand. Which Unauthorized Resellers are stealing your Buy Box, how much they are selling, what inventory are they holding and what disruption are they causing. You’ll understand the dollar impact of unauthorized sales and your annualized lost margin.  

EXPOSE – Who is damaging your Brand? Get granular detail on the Authorized Partners allowing product to flow to Unauthorized Resellers - enabling price and margin disruption. Expose where and who the goods were shipped from/to and quantify the damage each Authorized Partner is causing. 

DISMANTLE – Now you know ‘what and who’ we show you how to stop it from happening. Ordian MI’s knowledge garnered from years in the market allows us to identify the right action to dismantle Gray Market activity. Our Advisory Team works with you to eliminate the problem at the source.  

DEPLOY – The final step in the process. Now you need a way to legitimately manage returned, overstocked or end of line goods. The Ordian team can help guide you in the best approaches and introduce you to industry leaders in each field. 

Using our unique Marketplace Intelligence solution, we combine digital intelligence with in-market expertise to deliver exceptional results. We are not driven by the number of ASINS you have or how many platforms you’re on – what matters to us is outcomes.

Name: Big Heart Technology
Description:
Our mission in life is to reinvent non-profit fundraising.

Instead of asking for money, why not just ask someone to play a fun mobile game? People love playing mobile games. Giving money? Not so much.

We don't charge non-profits for this. It's our way of giving back.

We thought digital advertising could help with the fundraising. But no one likes 60-second TV commercials or banner ads forced on them. And quite frankly, they pay terrible, so they wouldn't contribute much.

We thought about market surveys. They pay much better. But online surveys are awful — epically so — especially on mobile.

So what would any self-respecting tech company do in this situation? Of course, create our own survey network.

Along the way, we realized we were reinventing a second industry: Market research.

So we've changed our company name from Big Heart Trivia to Big Heart Technology. To better reflect what we do, and that is to invent all kinds of technology to help make the world a little bit better place.

Whether you're a non-profit or media company, we thank you for helping, too. :)

We’re passionate about unlocking the power of 𝗺𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻 𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘀 so funds can punch above their weight, drive member value, and focus their teams on what truly matters: delivering health outcomes, not managing legacy systems.


Prometheus Information has a proud 30-year history and has been serving Australian health insurers for over two decades. We’ve modernised it for today’s challenges.


Our leadership team brings 𝗱𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝗶𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘆 𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲: Clinton and Josh have 15+ years each leading data and analytics in large corporations, including 5 years each in health insurance, delivering tens of millions in analytics projects. Our senior statistical advisor George, one of the original founders, is formally trained in mathematics and AI and has decades of expertise applying statistical methods to healthcare.


When Clinton and Josh were at CUA Health, the regulator noted during a prudential review that their analytics capabilities were ahead of peers and most larger funds. That’s when we saw the opportunity: make that same sophistication accessible to the entire market.


We’re already working with HCF—Australia’s 3rd largest health fund—on our fraud detection solution Appraise, and are in advanced discussions with other funds for our modernised data platform ProInsight.


The timing couldn’t be better. 𝗔𝗣𝗥𝗔 𝗶𝘀 𝗽𝘂𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗶𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘆 𝘁𝗼 𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗴𝗲 𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗮 to demonstrate member value, while fraud and anti-selection pressures grow—especially for smaller funds. Yet too many are stuck with inflexible homegrown solutions that have key person risk and limit performance.

Prometheus solves this with purpose-built platforms that address the foundational analytics work—so internal teams can focus on the high-value insights.

This is not just about maps or reports: the platform allows users to query territories, gain personalized insights in real time, and go beyond traditional data analysis.

Our approach integrates Earth Observation (EO) data, business intelligence data, predictive models, and both local and global databases.

We combine AI tools, conversational interfaces, and interactive visualizations to turn massive volumes of raw data into understandable insights—even for non-expert users.

GeospatialX delivers decision-ready information, helping clients to:

- Optimize resource allocation (e.g., logistics, retail site selection, infrastructure)
- Improve operational performance by reducing costs and decision-making time
- Identify new market opportunities and strategic geographic targets
- Mitigate environmental risks (e.g., in insurance, infrastructure, decarbonization)

Where artificial intelligence meets the map of the world: the bridge between ChatGPT and Google Earth, enabling decisions with simplicity and precision.

Name: ABRISHAM ROAD
Description:
The ancient land of Iran has long been the source of knowledge and industry, and 
Iranians have played a significant role in the development, evolution and promotion 
of science and human awareness. Most historians of the world believe that most of 
the advances in science and human civilization are owed to Iranian civilization and the 
most brilliant works of art and the highest industrial levels has come from the minds 
of Iranians. Metalworking industries, agricultural industry, pharmacy and alchemy 
with themes including tile glazing, carpet dyeing, fabrics and glass were some of the 
industries that were considered by ancient Iranians. In parallel with the special attention 
to the development of industry, the history of mutual trade relations between Iranians 
and other civilizations in East and Central Asia, Europe and Africa has a long history, and 
Iranians have played a significant role in the expansion of global altruism since long ago 
by being on the route of the Silk Road and maritime trade.
We Iranians today, like our ancestors, consider industry, art and production in our ancient 
land to be a transformative and constructive place, and we consider the development 
of technological interactions and the trade of knowledge-based industrial products with 
other countries as an opportunity for friendship and the expansion of ties.

Name: DataSnack
Description: DataSnack revolutionizes AI testing by introducing Prompt-Driven Testing (PDT), a groundbreaking methodology that transforms how enterprises validate and improve AI systems. Unlike traditional testing approaches that rely on static test cases or manual reviews, DataSnack dynamically generates comprehensive test scenarios directly from prompts, allowing organizations to explore the full complexity of AI model behavior. By treating prompts as the central artifact for test specification, the platform can automatically uncover edge cases, identify potential failures, and clarify task boundaries with unprecedented precision. This approach enables enterprises to reduce production risks by up to 85%, dramatically improve output consistency, and accelerate AI development cycles by generating contextually relevant test cases that evolve alongside the model's capabilities. DataSnack doesn't just test AI systems—it intelligently maps the entire landscape of potential interactions, providing a proactive solution to the unpredictability that has long plagued AI deployment.

Menutize operates as the "API for the Real World."

We have solved this by deploying the definitive operating system that standardizes these offline interactions into digital assets.

Our Mission: Menutization We have moved beyond simple "upfront pricing" to engineer a universal standard where services—like lawn care, repairs, or detail work—are transformed into fixed-scope, fixed-price products called Menu Cards. This is not just about automation; it is about creating a transactable SKU that both humans and AI agents can instantly book. We replace the inefficiencies of the "quote-and-wait" model with immediate commerce.

The Command Center Menutize replaces the fragmented tech stack of service professionals with a fully integrated ecosystem:

AI Storefront: Instant booking engines powered by structured schema markup.

Unified CRM: A single timeline of truth for every client interaction.

Smart Automations: Hands-free communication loops that close jobs automatically.

Financial Hub: Instant settlement and subscription management.

Infrastructure for the AI Age We are not asking for permission to digitize the service economy. We are actively paving the roads before the autonomous vehicles arrive. By enforcing a universal schema where a service description means the same thing everywhere, we have established the clearinghouse where the next generation of digital agents will come to dispense labor.

We turn Chaos into Commerce.

Description:
Smart, Simple, Powerful – The All-in-One Client Management and Billing System for Small Businesses.

"Streamline invoicing, manage clients, track expenses, and drive your business forward – all with Bamboo!
Customer Relationship Management (CRM)
Bamboo CMS makes managing your customers a breeze. Easily store and organize client information, manage multiple contacts for each customer, and set permissions with full control. The client portal ensures that your customers have a clear view of their financial data, while you stay organized and connected. Bamboo’s CRM tools allow you to track leads, manage follow-ups, and convert estimates into invoices automatically, ensuring you never miss an opportunity.
Invoices, Recurring Billing & Financial Management
Create professional invoices in seconds with Bamboo CMS. Track your invoices, manage different tax rates, and generate reports—all with ease. Set up recurring invoices and expenses to be automatically generated based on your specified timeframes—whether it’s daily, weekly, monthly, or yearly. Plus, you can customize invoices with your branding, automate billing reminders for repeat clients, and stay on top of your finances with detailed reports on income, expenses, and cash flow. Bamboo CMS is designed to make financial management seamless, ensuring you stay on top of taxes and compliance with minimal effort.
Proposals, Estimates & Sales Engagement
Creating impactful proposals and estimates is easy with Bamboo CMS. Design proposals that wow your clients, send estimates instantly, and keep track of the sales process. Bamboo CMS automatically converts approved estimates into invoices, so you can bill your clients faster. With automatic notifications when proposals are accepted or declined, and customizable reminders for overdue proposals, you can stay ahead of the game and increase your sales conversion rate.

Name: Insyt Connect
Description:
Insyt: Embedded, Actionable Analytics—Without Moving Your Data

What We Do:
Insyt is an AI-powered analytics platform that lets teams and customers ask questions in natural language—and instantly get insights, predictions, and automated actions—all embedded directly into your applications.

Why It Matters:
Traditional BI tools force you to move data, wait for dashboards, and manually act. Insyt changes the game:
 Ask Anything – From simple queries to ML-driven predictions (“Forecast Q4 demand”) in 50+ languages.
 Act Instantly – Trigger workflows (emails, CRM updates) directly from insights—no coding.
 Zero Data Movement – Secure proxies keep data in your databases while delivering results to your UI.

For Whom:
- Product Teams embedding self-serve analytics for customers.
- Enterprises automating data-driven actions (retail, fintech, energy).
- Security-conscious orgs that can’t risk SaaS data leaks.

Differentiators:
 Conversational + ML – Not just queries; auto-apply forecasts, clustering, and more.
 Closed-Loop Automation – Insights become actions (“Email discounts if…”).
 Self-Hosted Data – Process in the cloud, but raw data never leaves your systems.

Join the Movement:
We’re partnering with forward-thinking teams to redefine how data drives decisions.

Name: Kredibl.io
Description:
Securely share your financial health with your suppliers, and get better credit terms 

What is credit health ?

Your suppliers use your business’ credit health to decide if you can pay your invoices, and whether they should give you credit terms.

Common credit terms include “cash on delivery”, or payment 30 days after delivery. 90 days after delivery is not uncommon!

Getting better credit terms with your suppliers allows you to pay later, freeing up cash you can use!

Negotiating better credit terms is a matter of trust between you and your supplier, and an understanding of their financial health - and their ability to pay

Traditional Credit Scores depend on financial data that is often 2 years out of date, making it hard for you to change their perception!

------------------------

Build your credit health profile using your bank transactions

Credit Expert View of your business
- See how your supllier evaluate your company

Credit health improvement tips
- Practical improvement tips from credit industry experts

Make changes and refresh
- Apply tips and re-run Kredibl any time
- See impact of your changes instantly (not next year!)

Securely share your credit health
- No more building spreadsheets
- Easily share your creditworthiness to your suppliers
- Get the credit terms that you deserve

Built for Belgian SMEs by Credit and Open Banking experts

What is Open Banking?
- Open Banking allows users to connect their bank data to theirr preferred tech (accounting software ERPs, Kredibl etc.)

How does Open Banking help Credit health scoring?
- You can now keep your financial health up to date
- Changes you make reflected instantly
- No more waiting for yearly financials to be published

Is my data secure?
- Data security is ensured by abc technology, regulated by Belgian government
- Access can easily be turned off at any time

Is it complicated?
- Fully automated
- No documents to send
- No spreadsheets to build
- No follow up calls InKredibly simple!

Our focus areas include:

Generative Artificial Intelligence
We build LLM-powered solutions to automate operational and administrative workflows, using secure and controlled architectures such as RAG. Our approach prioritizes reliability, traceability, and integration with existing tools and systems.

Machine Learning
We apply machine learning where it adds real value, including predictive analytics, anomaly detection, optimization, and decision-support systems. All models are designed to be maintainable, monitored, and production-ready.

Data Engineering
We design and operate data platforms that serve as the foundation for analytics and AI. This includes data ingestion pipelines, data lakes and warehouses, data modeling, governance, and analytics-ready datasets.

Cloud Engineering
We build scalable, secure, and cost-efficient cloud infrastructures to support data and AI workloads, covering architecture design, deployment, observability, and long-term operation.

Our purpose is to democratize operational and administrative intelligence, enabling organizations to make data-driven decisions with confidence, efficiency, and long-term sustainability.

La durata prevista è di circa un'ora, durante la quale avrai l'opportunità di porre domande e interagire con i relatori. Cosa aspettarsi dalla presentazione? Durante la presentazione, approfondiremo i concetti chiave dell'intelligenza artificiale, analizzeremo casi di studio di successo e discuteremo delle soluzioni personalizzate che Futuria Momentum può offrire alla tua azienda. L'Impact pour Nos Partenaires (Flottes et Assureurs)
AccessScan CI ne fait pas que réparer. Nous assurons la stabilité financière et la sécurité :
Réduction des Coûts : Nous aidons les flottes à réduire leurs coûts opérationnels jusqu'à 40% en éliminant les pannes imprévues et en optimisant les achats de pièces.
Notre Engagement
Nous construisons la base de données la plus riche et la plus précise sur l'état du parc automobile en Côte d'Ivoire. Nous sommes en phase de lancement de notre collecte de données auprès des garages et des flottes.

We are technical market leaders in the field of competitor & retailer price monitoring.

Our UK based team build tailored solutions to deliver data to you in the format that you need it – either via our state of the art interactive dashboard or data can be delivered to clients in simple bespoke reports "ready to use".

You simply tell us which websites that you would like to monitor, and we collect the data for you on a frequency to suit you (daily, weekly or monthly are standard options).

We collect data across all retail sectors, including grocery, cosmetics, pet products, toys, music, printing, photography, DIY & tools, food supplements, cycling, kitchen goods, car accessories, furniture, children’s goods, off-licences, and travel to name just a few.

Our A.I. backed technology allows us to create product matches automatically where information is available to confirm a match, and our Advanced Match Console allows our customers to manage any manual matching that is required without having to revert to our Technical team. We also give you the flexibility to take into account pack or unit size differences in products – as well as giving you the option to define your own match types – such as identical, comparable or variant matches.

We offer a simple commercial model allowing you to pay on a monthly basis without expensive setup fees - allowing you to obtain value for money quickly and profitably.

Name: Gigly Tech Inc
Description:
More than 70% of mobility gig workers across Asia/Africa are excluded from formal finance and pushed into predatory rentals or informal loans that take 50–60% of daily earnings. They can’t buy income-generating assets (car/motorbike), remain stuck in poverty cycles, and platforms suffer churn and poor fleet quality. Environmentally, older ICE fleets increase CO₂ and hazardous waste. Capital is available (ESG) but there’s no compliant, tech-enabled solutions that can underwrite “unscoreable” drivers/workers and secure the asset, increase their income and impact on the environment.
Our comprehensive financial inclusion solution encompasses transparent vehicle financing that enables asset ownership through rental for drivers while ensuring supply of vehicles to the platform operators. Our flexible short term and long term financing models enable drivers to drive the vehicle of their choice, on the other hand our peer-to-peer financing marketplace channels mission-aligned capital directly to finance a drivers vehicle. Our IoT-enabled smart monitoring systems and app ensures asset monitoring and risk minimization. On the other hand our P2P financing platform enables micro investors  earn competitive income while supporting drivers asset ownership. Additionally, our micro-insurance and financial literacy programs build long-term resilience,

Name: Nigeria International Pulp And Paper Summit
Description:
Finally, our dream of solving the pulp and paper challenge in Nigeria has kick-started with the first Nigeria Pulp and paper summit 2022.

Be part of the biggest gathering of pulp and paper in Sub Sahara Africa!

Theme: Bridging the gap in local pulp and paper production in Nigeria

The Minister for Industry, Trade, and Investment  Hon. Minister Otunba Richard Adeniyi Adebayo will be declaring the event open

Date:  October 17-19,2022

Venue: Sheraton Hotel, Abuja, Nigeria

Goals of the summit: 
•	To showcase the potential along the pulp and paper value as a viable complement to agriculture in terms of employment generation, wealth creation, and national development.
•	To serve as a point of convergence for stakeholders in the paper and pulp value chain in Nigeria and to fashion a holistic approach to understanding the challenges of the value chain and to proffer their resolutions.
•	To create a “stakeholders” all-inclusive policy.
•	To understand pulp and paper production and investment opportunities.

Registration and investment gates are open at the summit.

Opportunities:
Annual three million metric tons ready market for pulp and paper
Round table discussion with key top government functionaries, decision-makers, and investors.
Favourable policy for investment and ease of doing business in Nigeria.

To participate: visit: www.pulpandpapernigeria.org  

Organisers: Chartered Institute of Professional Printers of Nigeria (CIPPON), in collaboration with the Federal Ministry of Industry, Trade, and Investment, Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (MAN), and the Lagos Chambers of Commerce and Industry (LCCI).

Event managers
DCS Integrated Media Limited

Description:
Santa Fair is an annual trade Fair borne by SANTA FAIR AFRIQUE duly registered in South East Nigeria.
In 2018, three women who owned small businesses synergized to make more sales and gain visibility by Leveraging each other's contact. Realizing the need for visibility as a factor for business growth, they set up Santa Fair Afrique to extensively broaden the vision to reach out to more women-owned SMEs. This vision has been desperately driven since then to see small businesses gain visibility. 
SANTA FAIR AFRIQUE is set out to push and promote SMEs owned by women to compete in the global market.

OUR VISION
To Empower women-owned SMEs, to compete in the global Market.
MISSION
To Build a community of women SMEs, to promote healthy competition, growth, and confidence.
Accomplishments 
Having started a movement for these SMEs in 2018, peculiar to every new movement, there was little or no believability in her but we did not quit. Today Santa Fair Afrique has helped over 3000 women-owned SMEs gain visibility for four years, created online communities to enhance networking amongst themselves, and organized Business master classes.
We organized our first local trade Fair for these SMEs in December 2018 with zero external financing or support. Since then, we have successfully pulled the trade Fair off every December, and in 2021 we introduced the Easter edition for women to access more visibility for what they do. 
By Santa fair 4.0, we had our big break! Santa Fair 2021 recorded over 150 vendors and 7000 buying crowd. For the first time, small business owners recorded up to ₦4 million worth of sales in just 3 days. 
Santa Fair has begun a fast-rising upward launch of small businesses owned by women starting in South East Nigeria and this year is her five year in pursuit.
We are extending our influence to Top notable Companies like yours to play a major role in helping women-owned SMEs access visibility.

Name: Working Ben
Description:
Die Zukunft der Jobsuche – Einfach. Direkt. Effizient.

Working-Ben ist die innovative Plattform, die den Arbeitsmarkt neu denkt. Wir bringen Arbeitnehmer und Unternehmen auf völlig neue Weise zusammen, indem wir die klassischen Bewerbungsprozesse umdrehen. Arbeitnehmer erstellen ein einziges Profil, das sie durch ihr gesamtes Berufsleben begleitet. Unternehmen haben direkten Zugriff auf eine Vielzahl von Kandidaten und sehen auf einen Blick, welche Rahmenbedingungen für einen Wechsel entscheidend sind – ganz ohne Stellenanzeigen oder lange Bewerbungsverfahren.

Was wir machen:
Wir ermöglichen Arbeitnehmern, ihre Wünsche und Erwartungen an ihren nächsten Job einmalig festzuhalten – vom Gehalt über Arbeitszeiten bis hin zu Benefits.
Unternehmen können aus einer Vielzahl passender Kandidaten auswählen und gezielt diejenigen ansprechen, die wirklich zum Unternehmen passen.
Unser Fokus liegt auf Effizienz, Transparenz und Fairness, sowohl für Arbeitnehmer als auch für Arbeitgeber.
Für wen wir da sind:
Arbeitnehmer: Egal ob Fachkräfte, Berufseinsteiger oder Führungspersonen – mit Working-Ben behalten sie die volle Kontrolle über ihren Karriereweg, ohne aktiv suchen zu müssen.
Unternehmen: Vom kleinen Handwerksbetrieb bis zum Großkonzern – wir helfen dabei, schnell und unkompliziert die richtigen Talente zu finden, die wirklich passen.
Was uns vom Rest unterscheidet:
Ein einziges Profil für das ganze Leben: Kein wiederholtes Bewerben mehr – Arbeitnehmer müssen sich nur einmal registrieren.
Umkehr des Bewerbungsprozesses: Nicht der Bewerber bewirbt sich beim Unternehmen, sondern das Unternehmen beim Bewerber.
Maximale Transparenz: Arbeitgeber sehen von Anfang an die Anforderungen der Kandidaten und können gezielt passende Angebote machen.
Zeit- und Kostenersparnis: Unternehmen sparen sich den Aufwand und die Kosten für Stellenanzeigen und finden schneller geeignete Mitarbeiter.
Anonymität und Datenschutz: Nutzer behalten die Kontrolle über ihre Daten und entscheiden selbst

Name: CSR5 Global Incorporated
Description:
Welcome to CSR5 GLOBAL

Overview:

In today's rapidly revolving digital age, businesses face an increasingly complex landscape, with cybercrime posing a formidable, and sometimes intimidating, challenge. 

At CSR5 GLOBAL, we understand the intricacies of managing business risks and the critical need for robust cyber defense strategies. Our mission is to empower businesses to navigate the digital realm with confidence, ensuring their operations are secure and resilient against evolving cyber threats.

The Problem:

The rise of cybercrime is relentless, with estimated global financial losses reaching $600 billion in 2024 alone. Traditional cyber defense measures, while necessary, often fall short, being costly, disjointed, and operating in silos. This leaves businesses vulnerable to attacks that can disrupt operations, damage reputations, and inflict significant financial losses.

The Solution:

CSR5 GLOBAL introduces a revolutionary approach to cyber defense, merging response and recovery phases into a cohesive framework that significantly reduces the likelihood of successful attacks. Our unique software, in conjunction with the strategic offerings of our partners, targets a broad spectrum of cyber threats, ensuring unauthorized access to networks and data is blocked. In the event of a breach, our network of specialists in legal, digital forensics, and public relations is ready to facilitate rapid recovery, helping you resume operations and revenue generation quickly in the event of an attack.

Our subscription model offers comprehensive services at rates below the industry average, with a monthly fee of $500 covering up to 10 users. This fee includes cutting-edge ransomware protection software, designed to thwart attacks in the evolving post-quantum landscape, along with discounted access to essential services for post-attack recovery.

Ready to Secure Your Business's Future?
