Name: Institut Club Artistique de Paris
Description:
I.C.A.P. Een club van fijnproevers.
Toen

1922 was het geboortejaar van het Institut Club Artistique de Paris in – hoe kan het anders – Parijs.

Tien jaar later nam de nestor van het moderne kappersvak in Nederland Jean Henri Heuschen het initiatief een eigen afdeling in Nederland op te richten. Belangrijke voorwaarden voor het lidmaatschap: Naast een artistieke opstelling met betrekking tot het kappersvak ook een brede belangstelling voor kunst en cultuur in het algemeen.

Nu
Heden ten dage gelden deze uitgangspunten nog steeds. Sommige leden zijn actief op artistiek terrein en beoefenen ook zelf daadwerkelijk een of andere vorm van kunst. Ook mode mag als uiting van kunst beschouwd worden en is frequent het thema van de voor- en najaar bijeenkomsten.

Fijnproevers
Deze kwalificatie is zeker op z’n plaats bij de beoordeling van de activiteiten waarmee de club zich duidelijk onderscheidt van de andere artistieke clubs, die in Nederland opereren. Een vriendenclub evenzeer omdat het sociale contact binnen I.C.A.P. zeer hoog in het vaandel staat en de grenzen van oppervlakkige collegialiteit daarmee overschrijdt. Vanzelfsprekend worden de partners van de leden daarbij direct betrokken. Een volstrekt logische consequentie gezien de dagelijkse betrokkenheid met het vak.

Activiteiten
Twee maal per jaar komen de leden van het I.C.A.P bijeen. Deze evenementen vormen voor het huidige ledenbestand, traditioneel, hoogtepunten in het jaar. De  bijeenkomsten zijn soms ludiek te noemen, maar hebben vaak een educatief en informatief karakter. Het idee is mensen in contact te brengen met bijzondere en kunstzinnige zaken.

Al met al zou je de leden van het I.C.A.P. cultureel ontwikkeld kunnen noemen. Dit blijkt onder andere uit de zeer gevarieerde onderwerpen die de afgelopen jaren aan de orde zijn geweest.

Enkele voorbeelden:
Jubileum weekenden.
Theater.
Dans.
Muziek.
Architectuur.
Culinaire verkenningen.
Fotografie.
Antieke beschaving en cultuur.
Jacht en natuur.

Vyrr AI is building a simpler way for businesses to run on conversations.

Across the region, millions of small and mid-sized businesses run on WhatsApp. Orders, follow-ups, payments, customer support, and coordination all happen in chat. Yet these conversations are scattered, manual, and disconnected from the tools businesses need to grow. Existing software is expensive, complex, and built for markets that do not reflect local realities.

Vyrr AI solves this by bringing everything into one simple, affordable, WhatsApp-first platform.

We help businesses turn daily conversations into structured actions. Orders get captured automatically. Customers get followed up on time. Payments are tracked. Teams stay aligned. Business owners finally get visibility without changing how they already work.

South Asia is our starting point because the need is most urgent here. Fast-growing businesses are underserved by existing software that is complex, expensive, or designed for entirely different markets. We are building Vyrr AI to solve these problems first, then take this approach globally.

Our long-term vision is to become the conversation layer for modern commerce worldwide, starting with WhatsApp and expanding wherever businesses need us.

Vyrr AI is for businesses that want clarity instead of complexity, growth without heavy software, and a system that works the way they do.

Our Platform Ecosystem:

• Aegis Sentinel — A next-generation RegTech compliance platform for enterprise-scale financial institutions, delivering automated, policy-driven monitoring and reporting to meet evolving global regulatory standards with precision and transparency.

• Etherium Data Fabric — A global supply chain optimization platform that unifies disparate data streams, enabling real-time visibility, predictive analytics, and adaptive logistics for complex, multi-region operations.

• Federated Agent Playground, ConsortiumXY — A deployed, experimental A/B-pane meta-AI environment where domain-specific agents collaborate to tackle the most complex queries and multi-dimensional problems, integrating seamlessly with enterprise systems for rapid prototyping and solution deployment.

Finally, we believe that AI should be a power balancer. Our platforms are built with privacy, fairness, and accessibility at their core—empowering businesses while creating opportunities for historically marginalized groups. We donate a portion of our profits directly to charities promoting equity, inclusivity, and broader AI democratization.

Every business, no matter how small, deserves the clarity and efficiency that comes from truly understanding how their operations flow.
We’re currently building our first prototype platform — a lightweight, easy-to-use tool that helps small and mid-size businesses discover, analyze, and optimize their internal processes.
Our goal is to give business owners real visibility into how their operations work — where time is lost, where costs build up, and where opportunities for improvement are hiding.
Today, most small businesses run on instinct and experience. Quantel aims to change that by bringing data-driven decision making and process intelligence to everyone — from restaurants and home-care agencies to tax offices, travel agencies, and local service providers.
We combine our background in process mining, analytics, and lean optimization to design tools that translate complex data into simple, actionable insight.
Our approach is hands-on, experimental, and deeply human — blending technology with empathy for the real challenges small business owners face daily.
This is just the beginning of our journey.
Our prototype is under development, our ideas are growing, and our motivation is stronger than ever.
As a young startup, we’re learning, iterating, and building toward a platform that can genuinely help businesses run smarter, faster, and more sustainably.

Description:
COGNETIX is a performance-focused enterprise software company dedicated to building solutions that increase revenue, drive positive impact, and decrease the costs associated with both. 

Introducing Persona AI, "Your Competitive Advantage"

Persona AI is an AI-powered real-time customer behavior modeling platform.

It transforms customer "noise" into a single clear channel that you own. It creates dynamic consumer personas that are constantly being updated with both new data coming into the platform and input from your experts. You can see how your customer's behavior changes and evolves in real-time and take action before your competition even notices the trend.

Persona AI is an evolutionary step in the way marketers communicate with their customers. It enables end-users to analyze, report, and action customer activity at a data purity and accuracy level never seen before. The final output is a proprietary and privacy-compliant data repository that you own and which only grows in value and accuracy over time.

And the best part?  There are no heavy IT integration or platform replacements. Persona AI is additive to your existing system and is completely platform agnostic. 

PERSONA AI CAN HELP
[-] Optimize online ad spend through forensic targeting and dynamic, near-limitless segmentation.
[-] Increase conversion rate, average cart value and customer lifetime value by offering the right content at the right time to the right customer. 
[-] Improve sales by tracking customer intent and ranking those most and least likely to buy.
[-] Capture real-time feedback on new content, offers and promotions.
[-] Perform surveys, user and focus group testing with your customer personas as the test group for such things as ad and marketing creative, physical product design, etc.
[-] Test and fine-tune customer satisfaction programs before you incur the cost to implement them.
[-] Pinpoint where your customers’ attention is across  digital media via heat mapping and eye tracking

Name: B-Rewards
Description:
Nasciamo Italiani, in contro-tendenza e contro-corrente….
I Cervelli scappano, qualcuno lo spegne, qualcun altro preferisce non accenderlo… noi, al contrario, abbiamo voluto metterlo alla prova dopo tanta esperienza a supporto di aziende altrui, spesso estranee ai nostri obiettivi… 
In un periodo, marchiato da pandemia e minacce di recessione, dove le opportunità fioriscono e pochi sono disposti a mettersi in gioco per coglierle… 
Impavidi, eludendo ogni buon consiglio fondato sul «ma chi te lo fa fare con tutto stò casino», abbiamo lavorato per quasi un anno su un ’idea, perché il nostro progetto potesse illuminarsi e prendere vita… 
Un sogno nel cassetto, il cui embrione aveva visto la luce nel 2015 e, tale rimase fino ad un anno e mezzo fà
Una revisione profonda, non dei principi e dei valori che avrebbe dovuto comunque rappresentare e proteggere, ma delle tecnologie, dei processi e delle procedure affinchè lo rendessero semplice, snello e alla portata di tutti. 
Un nuovo voto di fede, nei partners con cui abbiamo condiviso ore e ore di brainstorming, nelle persone che rappresentano e rappresenteranno il nostro pubblico di cui abbiamo cercato di analizzare difficoltà, incertezze, così che potessimo presentarci con soluzioni innovative che rendessero veramente più facile la loro quotidianeità. 
Un approccio nuovo ad una realtà esistente, una rivisitazione imponente del «win-win-win» dove le parole fossero reale espressione di un fatto.

Description:
Professionele managementrapportering voor uw KMO. Wij bieden business inzicht op basis van op maat gemaakte real-time dashboards.

Vandaag wordt nog veel gebruik gemaakt van Excel wanneer bedrijven inzicht willen in hun cijfers. Echter, Excel is niet ontwikkeld voor uitgebreide rapportering en is bovendien foutgevoelig. Het alternatief is vaak dure, gespecialiseerde software. Als gebruiksvriendelijke oplossing hebben wij met onze diverse modules standaard rapporten en dashboards gebouwd. Hiervoor maken we gebruik van Microsoft-technologie Power BI, Power Apps en Power Automate. Maar ook maatwerk wordt op vraag van onze klanten door ons ontwikkeld. Dat maakt onze oplossing laagdrempelig en toegankelijk.

Het traject dat we met onze klant doorlopen, start met het begrijpen van hun bedrijfsprocessen. Vervolgens bouwen we een connectie met boekhouding, crm-tools en andere operationele software en sluiten we af met het afleveren van de aangepaste rapporten”, gaat Andre verder.

Onze klanten kunnen nu hun rapporten met realtime data raadplegen via het portaal Xerppa. Dat betekent dat de meest recente cijfers via een beveiligde login ad hoc beschikbaar zijn en zelfs meteen gepresenteerd kunnen worden, bijvoorbeeld tijdens de wekelijkse managementmeeting.

Tot slot geven we onze klant een opleiding op maat in het gebruik en de interpretatie van de rapporten want ons finale doel is dat zij onafhankelijk hun eigen rapporten kunnen samenstellen en ontwikkelen.

Name: Executive Alliance
Description:
In einer Welt, in der Dienst am Nächsten und Wohltätigkeit eine bedeutende Rolle spielten, bildete sich eine neue Organisation aus Netzwerkern aus verschiedenen internationalen Serviceclubs. Ihre jetzigen Serviceclubs sind bekannt für ihre Großzügigkeit und ihre Bemühungen, Geld und Ressourcen für gemeinnützige Zwecke zu spenden. Ihre Diskretion und ihr Engagement für humanitäre Anliegen sind bewundernswert, aber unsere Netzwerker erkannten auch, dass es eine essentielle Komponente gab, die die derzeitigen Humanitären Gemeinschaften vernachlässigt hatten: die wirtschaftliche Grundlage, die es ermöglichte, Wohlstand zu schaffen, um einen nachhaltigen Einfluss zu haben.

Und so entstand die Executive Alliance, ein Zusammenschluss von Netzwerkern, die erkannten, dass wahre Freiheit und Gestaltungsmöglichkeiten nur erreicht werden können, wenn man die wirtschaftlichen Interessen fokussiere und zielgerichtet mit anderen Mitgliedern Schnittstellen schafft wo Wissen, Aufträge und Jobs gesammelt werden. Diese Allianz verbindet Menschen aus allen Bereichen des Lebens, über Parteigrenzen, Glaubensrichtungen und Herkunft hinweg.
Die Mitglieder der Executive Alliance sind individuell daran interessiert, an sich selbst zu arbeiten, ihre Fähigkeiten zu verbessern und ihre Netzwerke zu erweitern. In einer vertrauensvollen und diskreten Atmosphäre können sie ihre Wünsche, aber auch ihre Angebote offen kommunizieren. Einige nutzen die Möglichkeiten der Allianz, um persönlichen Wohlstand zu erlangen, während andere darauf abzielen, noch mehr Geld für gemeinnützige Zwecke zu generieren. Es ist jedem Mitglied selbst überlassen, wie es die gebotenen Chancen nutzt.

Nuestra narrativa central —“Diseñamos realidades visuales que amplifican emociones e ideas”— refleja un compromiso con la belleza y la intención. Cada imagen que creamos nace de una premisa simple pero poderosa: el buen diseño no solo comunica, provoca.

Trabajamos con marcas emergentes, creadores sin recursos visuales propios, diseñadores que quieren usar la IA como extensión estética y agencias que buscan contenido visual conceptual de alto nivel. Para todos ellos, creamos líneas de contenido recurrente: Visual Thinking, Procesos no visibles, Diseño Algorítmico de Identidad y Contenido sin rostro.

En Midnight Studios, hablamos desde el diseño, no desde la herramienta. Usamos un lenguaje visual y emocional, porque creemos que la mejor forma de que una idea sea comprendida es hacerla inevitable.

Name: HyveMynds
Description:
Loud personalities often overshadow quieter ones, thus most platforms, and even in-person interactions, fail to capture everyone's feedback. This risks overlooking innovative ideas and diverse viewpoints, hampering the collective potential for progress and improvement.

This led us to conceive of HyveMynds, where all ideas have the potential to be heard and considered.

Surveys are commonly used for gathering feedback, but they’re not great for generating new ideas. Plus they get mediocre response rates, because, you know, who wants to fill out a quiz?!

While discussion boards are great for free expression, they’re a nightmare to moderate, and useful insights are difficult to extract from thousands of comments! Also, they can feel like toxic swamps, scaring off participation.

With HyveMynds, feedback is collected with the simplicity and versatility of a discussion forum, but still gives structured results like a survey. 

A topic is presented and people respond in their own words. These words are then processed and merged into the existing response pool, giving real-time analytical insights, including answers that might not have been thought of.

Participants feel heard, and organizations can see the full diversity of what their audience truly values, letting them identify the best strategy, invest in the right features, or craft tactful messaging.

Name: groaº
Description:
groa° is the headless, agentic AI operating system that turns zero‑ and first‑party data into live retention intelligence and next‑best‑action decisions that grow profit instead of media spend. It was born from Retention‑First Growth, a methodology proven with 100+ ecommerce brands, and built to remove the execution gap teams face when they try to achieve top‑decile retention results on funnel‑first tooling.

Most ecommerce stacks are still running on funnel logic, even when teams want retention. Data is scattered across Shopify, Klaviyo, reviews, loyalty, and ads, so no one sees a single, live picture of the customer and operators waste hours stitching together a 360° view. Dashboards sit on top of that fragmentation and an outdated growth model, so they can describe the past but cannot decide the next best move with any depth or consistency.

groa° is retention‑native, not campaign‑native. It connects the entire ecommerce lifecycle into a closed‑loop growth flywheel, analysing what is happening and why in real time, then recommending the next‑best action at critical churn and value inflection points by orbit, segment, and channel. Where dashboards stop at what happened, groa° decides what should happen next in the customer lifecycle, surfacing opportunities, sequencing actions, and orchestrating experiences that increase lifetime value, margin, and loyalty velocity.

By operationalising Retention‑First Growth across Shopify‑led, connected commerce ecosystems, groa° turns disconnected tools and services into a single, coherent retention OS that operators can run, agencies can commercialise, and boards and investors can trust. 

Around the OS, groa°’s consulting, institute, and events programmes help brands and agencies adopt the same operating model, aligning strategy, education, and software around one retention‑first system where profitability compounds over time.

Welcome to Aksion.biz – Your Gateway to Financial Empowerment!

 Discover the Future of Finance in the Heart of Africa
In the vibrant heart of Addis Ababa, the capital of Africa, we proudly introduce Aksion.biz, the continent’s pioneering financial website and stock trading web-app. But what sets us apart isn’t just innovation; it’s our deep-rooted connection to Ethiopia and Africa’s rich financial heritage.

 Aksion – Beyond a Name, a Legacy
In Amharic, one of Ethiopia’s diverse languages, the word for “share” is “aksion” አክሲዮን. It’s a word that carries the weight of ambition, prosperity, and unity. At Aksion.biz, we embrace this spirit as we pave the way for a brighter financial future for Ethiopia and all of Africa.

 Unveiling a New Era of Financial Transparency
Did you know that Ethiopia is home to 29 banks, as confirmed by the National Bank of Ethiopia? Yet, navigating the world of finance here often requires a time-consuming hunt for information. Clients are left to visit each institution individually or browse their websites in search of vital services.

 Empowering You with Knowledge and Accessibility
Aksion.biz is here to change that. We’re on a mission to simplify the financial landscape for both clients and institutions alike. As we develop into a fully operational platform, we’re more than just a stock trading software. We’re your one-stop hub, aggregating data on banks, insurance, microloans, and the entire financial sector.

Name: SummitFlow
Description:
A few years ago we stood at the foot of the mountain of artificial intelligence, filled with excitement for the projected shift in how we fundamentally conduct business. Our initial goal was to open a window for companies onto their business operations using the advanced technology of language learning models and structured data. As we set out on our ascent we quickly realised our approach and the tools we had developed were wholly inadequate to deal with the perpetually shifting terrain. The models were powerful but imprecise. The data unstructured and often trapped in broken digital systems. Security and compliance protocols scattered or worse non-existent. We experienced the dangers, found shortcuts, traced signs of thin air, and carried the weight ourselves. We know that transformation is less about speed, and more about stability. No hype. Only charting the path. Thus began our sherpa journey to prepare people and processes for their ascent into the AI era.

We meet businesses where they are by offering an AI readiness assessment, digital maturity audits, change management guidance, all aligned with ISO42001 and cybersecurity best practices. Every journey with SummitFlow begins with truth: clarity, control and ROI. Not every summit is worth climbing.

Name: SPARCLE
Description:
SPARC empowers investors, companies, and consumers with the data, tools, and insights needed to build a more sustainable, secure, and prosperous future.  

The SPARCLE model measures how a company’s culture and stakeholder governance impact its performance and future fitness.  We do this by measuring how a company manages its Stakeholders, Purpose, Authenticity, Reputation, Capital, Long-term, and the Environment (its SPARCLE).  

SPARCLE answers: Is the world better off because a company is in it?  Does the company SPARCLE? Or has it lost its SPARC?  Is it approaching a stakeholder governance inflection point?  

SPARCLE's Corporate Culture Decoded podcast discusses how the world’s most successful companies profit from a purpose-first culture and how listeners can apply this to their investments, purchases, and career decisions.

Name: StarMaint AI
Description:
StarMaint AI: Transforming Maintenance Management with Smart, Practical AI

We all know that keeping things running smoothly in industrial and commercial operations is no small feat. It’s not just about getting things fixed when they break; it’s about making sure they don’t break in the first place. Enter StarMaint AI, a solution that’s taking the guesswork out of maintenance by making it smarter, faster, and way more efficient. If you've ever been stuck dealing with sudden downtime or scrambling to fix a machine, StarMaint AI is the helping hand you never knew you needed.

So, What Does StarMaint AI Do?

At the heart of StarMaint AI is its ability to predict and prevent problems before they happen. It doesn’t just wait for something to break down; it watches your equipment, learns how it behaves, and can even tell you when it’s about to act up. Think of it like having a super-intelligent assistant that’s always keeping an eye on your machinery. And hey, it’s not just for tech geeks—any business can use it, whether you’re managing a manufacturing line or keeping a fleet of vehicles running smoothly.

Now, we all love the idea of being prepared, right? StarMaint AI makes that possible with predictive maintenance. Basically, it helps you stay one step ahead of potential breakdowns. Instead of relying on outdated schedules (like checking machinery every month whether it needs it or not), StarMaint AI dives deep into the data and gives you a heads-up when something’s actually going wrong. You’ll know exactly what needs fixing—and when.

Contact us to learn why StarMaint AI is a Game Changer

Description:
As the owner of a coupon website, it's important to focus on providing value to your users. This means regularly updating your website with the latest and most relevant coupons and deals, as well as making it easy for users to search and find the discounts they are looking for.

One effective strategy is to categorize your coupons by retailer or product category, so that users can quickly find what they are looking for. You may also want to consider adding user reviews and ratings for coupons, which can help build trust and credibility with your audience.

To attract new users and retain existing ones, it's important to promote your website through various marketing channels, such as social media, email marketing, and paid advertising. You may also want to consider partnering with other websites or bloggers to promote your coupons to their audiences.

Overall, running a successful coupon website takes time and effort, but it can be a rewarding business that provides value to both shoppers and retailers.

Name: Future Value Generation (the book)
Description:
GPT
Are you prepared for the rapidly changing business landscape? How can your organization stay ahead in a tech-driven world? Do you have the tools to turn uncertainty into opportunity? "Future Value Generation" offers a strategic toolkit for leaders to adapt and shape future business scenarios proactively. This approach combines innovation, foresight, and strategy, strongly emphasizing human-centric design to create sustainable value. It's essential for enhancing organizational agility and adaptability in uncertain environments.

Why? In Future Value Generation, Daniel Egger offers a compelling and provocative answer: Innovation merely attempts to solve past problems, Strategy locks in a static worldview, and foresight too often explores what is possible but not practical. The missing integration of the three processes leads to a prioritization of the present and an intensifying urgency to prepare for the future. 

As the quantity and complexity of change will only increase, the pressure for executives to react to it and proactively shape their future grows. 

To create new value, companies need integration. The logic presented in this book explores the synergies and benefits of connecting innovation, foresight, and strategy. It offers a framework that increases the agility of strategic implementation, establishes a continuous and aligned innovation process, and explains how to generate value for the future. 

Filled with deep practical insights and fresh perspectives, Future Value Generation is a “how-to” for successful and profitable future organizations.

I am grateful for the contributions of several unique thinkers, executives, and designers who shared their expertise, insights, and stories. I thank Aga Szostek, Artur Arsénio, Diogo Dutra, Erica Orange, Érico Fileno, Harry West, Jeffrey Tjendra, Luis Gustavo, Malcolm Ryder, Maria Paula Oliveira, Mattia Crespi and Norman Wang.

Name: MBAGuide
Description:
MBA Guide is the independent, data‑driven MBA advisor for outcome‑focused students, comparing all 556 AACSB‑accredited programs so no one overpays for prestige or settles for guesswork. The mission is simple: put transparency, ROI, and affordability first—so every candidate can make the smartest MBA choice for their life and wallet, not just the Top‑25.

How we work: a published, repeatable methodology weighted toward what matters—accreditation quality, in‑state tuition, graduate salary, estimated ROI, program breadth, and student‑faculty ratios—sourced from AACSB, IPEDS/College Scorecard, BLS, BEA, and official school disclosures. Every number is cited, and rankings apply the same criteria to every school, online and on‑campus, to eliminate survey bias and opaque inputs.

What readers get: side‑by‑side comparisons of tuition, formats, concentrations, admissions, salary outcomes, and calculated ROI across the full market—not a curated subset—plus plain‑English guides on cost, funding, and value to turn research into confident decisions. The result is a fact‑first alternative to prestige‑driven lists, built for people who want real outcomes per tuition dollar.

Name: 가다
Description:
건설 현장 일자리 구할 때는
건설인력 일용직 비대면 중개 플랫폼, 가다

일당을 못받을까 걱정이세요?
믿을 수 있는 은행에서 먼저 일당을 당일 입금해드리는 가다!
임금체불 NO~ 안전하고 믿을 수 있는 ‘가다’로 출역하세요.

‘가다’ 플랫폼이 작동하는 방식은 이렇습니다.
1. 건설사가 일자리의 장소/시간/내용을 플랫폼에 등재
2. 근로자는 일자리 중 원하는 곳에 지원 신청(복수 신청 가능)
3. 신청 당일 구직자에게 매칭된 작업 장소/시간 통지
4. 근로자는 다음날 매칭된 현장에 가서 작업
5. 작업이 끝나면 당일 근로자 계좌로 작업수당 지급
(가다와 건설사 간의 임금 수령 여부와 관계 없이 가다와 제휴된 은행이 먼저 일당을 지급하기 때문에 체불 걱정이 없습니다.)

건설 일용직 근로자 입장에서는 많은 불편함을 해소할 수 있습니다.
1. 당일 현장으로 바로 출근 - 새벽에 인력사무소 앞에서 줄 서지 않아도 된다.
2. 안정적 건설일자리 구직환경 - 그 전날 내가 어디를 가야 하는지를 알 수 있다.
3. 확실한 노임 선지급시스템 - 일이 끝나면 바로 현금(일당)이 들어온다.

건설사 입장에서는 근로자 평가시스템을 통해 좋은 인력을 계획성 있게 활용할 수 있다는 장점이 있습니다.
1. 검증된 건설근로자 고용 - 평가 및 필터링 시스템
2. 안정적 인력 수급시스템 - 실시간 매칭 시스템
3. 고용인력 정산 투명성 제고 - 노무관리시스템 제공

- 매일 새벽 인력 시장이나 인력사무소에 일가다가 허탕치는 일은 이제 그만 !
: 내일 일을 오늘 정하고 아침에 여있게 현장으로 일가자.
- 노가다가 아닌 가다에서 좋은 일자리와 일당 지급도 받으시고 : 1일 1가다!
- 매일 일용직 일당 (단기 알바분은 노가다 일당)을 등록하신 계좌로 자동 입금처리 됩니다.

노가다 아닌 가다에서 건설 일자리와 일용직 일당을 당일 지급 받으세요.

모바일 인력사무소 , 가다어플 사용법

Name: Harmony Capital
Description:
Harmony Capital is a founder-led investment firm supporting growth-oriented transitions and legacy successions with top-tier owners.

We work with founders who want support or partial liquidity while continuing to lead the business, as well as founders who are thinking about stepping back and transitioning ownership to a long-term, responsible successor. Our goal with every business is to protect what already works, strengthen the systems, and grow responsibly without breaking the culture.

We love businesses with strong cash flow, loyal customers, and room to grow. We invest across B2B services, tech-enabled operations, and niche verticals—looking for companies with great bones and great people.

Harmony Capital isn’t private equity. It’s founder-led. We’re founder-first, not fund-first, which allows for more flexibility, faster timelines, and better alignment with operators.

We offer flexible and creative deal structures, typically using a combination of debt, equity, seller notes, earn-outs, and tiered exits. We design the deal with founders—not around a fund’s return profile.

In terms of valuations, we’re competitive with the market. We offer 4–8x EBITDA for service businesses, 3–5x ARR for technology companies, and a blended approach for tech-enabled hybrids. We typically target businesses in the £10–£50M range, with the ability to stretch up to £100M in the right situations.
We believe businesses deserve thoughtful capital, aligned partners, and long-term stewardship.

Name: CHRONICLES OF A FREE MIND
Description:
Introduction Overview

Chronicles of a Free Mind – No Cage, No Locked Horizons is a declaration against limits—mental, social, and structural. It is not just a series of reflections; it is a living exploration of what it means to think freely in an age of invisible chains. Every chapter is a confrontation: with conformity, with fear, with the subtle cages built not of iron but of expectations, systems, and self-doubt.

The phrase No Cage, No Locked Horizons captures its essence. A cage implies containment, a narrowing of possibilities. Horizons locked suggest a world where the future is predetermined, where imagination is shackled by boundaries drawn by others. This work rejects both. It argues that true human growth begins when thought refuses to be fenced in, when the mind ventures beyond sanctioned maps to chart its own course.

The Chronicles are not a manifesto of rebellion for rebellion’s sake, but a philosophy of deliberate freedom. They invite the reader to question what holds them captive, to unlearn inherited restrictions, and to embrace the raw, sometimes uncomfortable clarity of independent reasoning. It is a guide, a provocation, and at times a weapon—arming thinkers who refuse to let their destiny be dictated.

Strimix is a B2B end-to-end marketing analytics platform that provides full visibility into your marketing performance – from the first click to the final sale. Designed for marketers, entrepreneurs, and agencies, Strimix automatically collects and unifies data from your website, CRM, advertising accounts, and other channels into a single, easy-to-use reporting system. This enables you to quickly identify which campaigns, creatives, and traffic channels drive profit and which ones waste budget, so you can optimize spend and increase your marketing ROI.

With Strimix, you can automate your marketing reporting and save dozens of hours of manual work each week. No more waiting for sales department reports or juggling spreadsheets – the platform automatically calculates key metrics (e.g. CAC, ROAS, LTV) and updates them in real time. Strimix tracks each customer’s journey across all touchpoints, giving you a complete view of the sales funnel and accurate attribution for every lead and sale.

Strimix is up and running fast (basic setup takes as little as 1–10 days) and doesn’t require complex BI tools or technical specialists. You can easily configure custom metrics and reports without any coding, and grant your team or clients access to interactive dashboards. As a result, marketers can adjust campaigns on the fly with real-time data, business owners gain clear insight into marketing profitability, and agencies can effortlessly demonstrate results to their clients.

Who it’s for:
 Marketers who want to control campaign performance
 Business owners who need to see true advertising payback
 Agencies that want to automate reporting

What you get with Strimix:
 A complete view across all traffic sources
 Automated ROMI, CAC, LTV, CPL reports
 Setup in 7 days — no developers required
 Access for your entire team and partners

Our mission is to help businesses make decisions based on data, not guesswork.

Currently, we are researching vocal music recognition modules with the aim to recognize various types of music and timbres. We've successfully applied advanced algorithms for anomaly detection and uncovered the deep influence of music on culture and society. In the future, we will consolidate more music-related knowledge to continue training our music models.

• In terms of AI-based musical education, our team uses AI-based music education with guided mentorship. Our students, aged between U7 and U10, won multiple awards at the 2021-2023 International Youth Art Competition in Vienna, Austria. They have also excelled in the North China region's music competitions, garnering four first-place prizes and eleven second-place awards.

Name: DP POWER BI oplossingen
Description:
Voor alle oplossingen m.b.t. Power BI. Vanaf complete data driven projecten tot het bouwen van /ondersteunen bij een standalone dashboard.

Wil je met je bedrijf, stichting of vereniging data gedreven gaan werken of loop je hierin vast dan ben ik je geschikte partner. Via mijn 5 stappen model begeleid ik je van A-Z in dit proces:
   - Bepalen KPI’s a.d.h.v. strategie/doelstellingen/drijfveren
   - Beoordelen/verzamelen data
   - Bouwen dashboards in POWER BI
   - Implementatie
   - Evaluatie/nazorg

Heb je behoefte aan een interactief financieel informatiesysteem in POWER BI (V&W, Balans, Cashflow met allerhande specificaties) dan ben je bij mij aan het juiste adres. Mijn no nonsens financieel template is zeer snel implementeerbaar (wel onder de voorwaarde dat je data redelijk op orde is).

Ook voor beheersing, upgrading, onderhoud van bestaande POWER BI-dashboards kun je bij mij terecht. Je dashboards beoordelen, het datamodel optimaliseren en terugbrengen naar het meest eenvoudige model, checken van je DAX-berekeningen en deze waar nodig versnellen, visualisaties beoordelen en eventueel aanpassen etc. etc. Alles is bespreekbaar.

Kortom..... voor alles wat te maken heeft met POWER BI

Ben je geïnteresseerd, heb je nog vragen of wil je gewoon eens een kopje koffie met me drinken, stuur dan een bericht en ik neem zo snel mogelijk contact met je op. Bellen of emailen mag natuurlijk ook

Name: DSAIN - Strategic Cognition Engine
Description:
DSAIN — Dynamic Strategic Analysis & Intelligence Network
We’re advancing AI that thinks and reasons alongside executives — a strategic co-pilot that learns from every analysis.

The Challenge

Strategic analysis is slow and costly. Executives and analysts spend most of their time collecting data instead of testing ideas.

What We’re Developing

DSAIN is a research-driven decision-intelligence architecture that can answer questions like “Why did Intel lose ground to NVIDIA in AI?” by analyzing financial histories, identifying causal patterns, and revealing what drives competitive advantage. Each iteration improves its reasoning transparency and accuracy.

Our Approach

We combine financial-graph analytics with explainable, large-language-model reasoning to create auditable strategic intelligence.
Originating as a doctoral research initiative at the University of Calgary, DSAIN applies design-science principles to bridge strategy, cognition, and responsible AI.

The Vision

To transform strategic analysis from a manual, service-driven task into intelligent, explainable software — what SQL did for data queries, DSAIN aims to do for strategic questions.

Focus: Semiconductor and advanced-manufacturing sectors
Launch Path: Research-validated prototype by January 2026
For: Strategy teams, consultants, and institutional analysts
Status: Academic R&D in progress — building toward scalable decision-intelligence applications.

The information and data created and stored by any entity would appear in one location, in a safe environment, and can be made accessible to others across any sector.

This integrated system has been designed to provide a productivity tool to save compliance time and money across the entire federation.

At the same time, the platform's federation structure comprises four levels of authority: supervisor /admin /view only /participant access. Access implies a level of authority and hence accountability, which ensures transparency, e.g., policy approval and acknowledgment.

If implemented across already tested sectors such as Childcare and early Education, Aged care, Strata Management, and Sporting Organisations, this platform will establish best practices for data retention and sharing, leading to better monitoring and supervision within the business and information retention.

In addition, as the platform is modular, it is customisable to sectors that might want to implement only specific modules. 

The platform's dashboard setup provides automatic notifications at all levels, helping team members make better decisions and communicate within the business.

The platform has a ticketing support module to address administrative and technical issues. It also offers flexible subscription options, whether by subscription, per user, both, or through prepaid means. Billing cycles can be edited based on circumstances.

Bilston Group empowers organisations to stay ahead of regulatory demands, reduce administrative burden, and drive sustainable growth.

Connect with us to explore how our expertise can support your governance goals.

Name: angra.io
Description:
Quem não redesenhar a forma de decidir vai perder o direito de decidir para a IA


5 de janeiro de 2026
O que é a angra.io — e por que ela existe agora
A angra.io não nasceu para vender tecnologia. Tecnologia já existe em excesso.
Ela existe para resolver um problema mais profundo — e mais caro: empresas estão cercadas de dados, sistemas e IA, mas continuam decidindo mal.
Isso não é falha técnica. É falha de arquitetura de decisão.
O ponto cego do C-Level moderno
Durante décadas, liderança significava experiência, visão de mercado e decisão sob pressão. Esse modelo funcionou enquanto a informação era escassa, os sistemas eram lentos e a complexidade era administrável.
Esse mundo acabou.
Hoje, o problema não é falta de informação. É excesso de variáveis interdependentes.
IA, dados em tempo real, múltiplos sistemas, pressão regulatória e decisões que não podem mais esperar o “próximo comitê”.
O C-Level tradicional foi treinado para decidir sobre sistemas. O novo cenário exige decidir com sistemas. A maioria ainda não fez essa transição.
O que a angra.io faz, de fato
A angra.io atua onde quase ninguém quer atuar: antes do código, antes do dashboard, antes do software.
Ela ajuda empresas e executivos a responder perguntas que normalmente são ignoradas:
qual decisão realmente importa
o que deve ser humano e o que pode ser automatizado

Name: GulinTech
Description:
GulinTech is a technology company developing AI-driven automation solutions for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). Our mission is simple yet ambitious — to make document management and accounting affordable, transparent, and effortless through intelligent automation.

We built an Intelligent Document Agent - an AI-powered platform that automates the processing of financial documents and transactions. The system reads, classifies, extracts, and reconciles data from invoices, receipts, and bank statements automatically — ensuring accuracy, compliance, and massive time savings.

Key capabilities include:

1) Document Classification – Automatically identifying invoices, receipts, contracts, and other document types.

2) Data Extraction – Using OCR and NLP models to extract key financial information.

3) Transaction Reconciliation – Matching bank transactions to supporting documents in seconds.

Our platform has demonstrated up to 90% reduction in manual accounting work, freeing business owners to focus on running their companies instead of managing paperwork.

Our solutions combine state-of-the-art AI, machine learning, and cloud infrastructure. We leverage GCP and AWS platforms as well as frameworks such as LangChain, and vector databases to deliver scalable, secure, and reliable automation.

Our Vision

We believe that every SME should have access to intelligent tools that simplify finance, reduce costs, and enable growth. Our vision is to become Europe’s leading provider of AI-based accounting and document automation solutions, empowering millions of businesses to focus on innovation rather than administration.

We follow an iterative, client-driven development process, running live pilots with selected SMEs to continuously improve our models and user experience.

NHỮNG ĐIỀU "Binhan Pharmacy" MANG LẠI CHO BẠN LÀ GÌ?

Những kiến thức, bài học kinh doanh và động lực tích cực mà chúng tôi đã đọc, nghe, nhìn và tổng hợp từ những người thành công.

Phối hợp với các chuyên gia tổ chức các chương trình đào tạo, trao đổi kiến thức chuyên môn, gặp mặt, giao lưu.

Cung cấp đa dạng các dòng sản phẩm chất lượng, nguồn gốc uy tín trực tiếp từ nhà sản xuất trong và ngoài nước. Giúp nhà thuốc mang lại lợi nhuận tốt, thu hút và giữ chân khách hàng.

Đội ngũ tư vấn, chăm sóc nhiệt tình, luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ nhà thuốc xây dựng sự uy tín, truyền thông trên các mạng xã hội.

Serintago Foundation
Description:
"Serintago" embodies our reverse approach to the SDG framework – the name was born from the framework itself: SERies, INdicators, TArgets, GOals. Unlike traditional top-down methods that often involve a rough alignment of company activities with SDG goals, our platform begins at the most granular level. This allows organizations to provide detailed evidence of their impact, constructing a powerful narrative of positive change that is built from the ground up, rather than being loosely mapped at a company or project level. 

Serintago focuses on the research and development of an SDG-based, AI-enabled impact assessment platform. The development is managed using the OutSystems low-code platform. Extensive API integration with UN Statistics and a variety of impact databases provide up to date data to ensure relevance of the impact assessments. We focus on process mapping and optimisation through automation and AI agents to facilitate and democratise access to impact assessments, so that even the smallest of organisation are able to understand and communicate their impact.

Platform currently in MVP stage.

Name: FocusFlowAI
Description:
FocusFlowAI is the first productivity platform that refuses to fight human nature.

Most tools still assume everyone peaks at 9 a.m., that more blocked time equals better work, and that guilt is a good motivator.
We looked at thousands of real work sessions and saw the opposite: flow has its own rhythm — and almost nobody’s rhythm matches the standard calendar.

FocusFlowAI learns (in days, without manual tracking) exactly when you and your team are in flow, what kills it, and how your patterns shift week to week. Then it quietly protects those golden hours across Calendar, Slack, Notion, email — everywhere.

No new habits.
No forced routines.
Just deeper work, less burnout, and momentum that finally feels human.

What you actually get:
• Personal & team flow mapping
• Automatic shielding of high-focus windows
• Context-switching and interruption forensics
• Burnout early warnings and smart workload balancing
• Team-level insights without the creepy surveillance vibe

Our non-negotiables:
Human First • Clarity Over Chaos • Flow > Force • Radical Transparency • Constant Evolution

We’re in private pilot with 100 spots open to teams and individuals who are done forcing productivity and ready to multiply it instead.
Claim yours → focusflowai.app

Flow > Force

Name: PriviChat Inc.
Description:
Enterprises of all kinds – consulting firms, law firms, real estate brokerages, physicians, architects, financial services professionals, major corporations, SMEs, and virtually every other type of business – are confronted with a dilemma.  Their clients want to communicate through texting more than emails, and if they cannot communicate through texting, they are dissatisfied.  But there is currently no means by which an enterprise can manage the text messages their employees send and receive.  This leaves the enterprise with a huge exposure, not knowing what text messages might be unearthed when employee text messages are obtained during discovery in a legal dispute (SMS messages may be retained indefinitely by the cellular service provider).
 
Recognizing this trend, PriviChat Inc. was formed by Josh Manton and Mike Marmar to create the world’s most sophisticated and secure text messaging platform.  It is designed to allow the enterprise to fully manage text communications among their employees, and between their employees and clients.

Name: MOTIF Africa
Description:
Our why: Africa holds the critical minerals essential for humanity's future - from cobalt and lithium to rare earths and graphite that power AI and the clean energy transition. Yet historically, these resources have generated wealth elsewhere while leaving limited prosperity on the continent.

At MOTIF Africa, we're transforming this paradigm.

We envision an Africa where mineral resources catalyze generational wealth creation - where nations become strategic players in global value chains rather than mere raw material exporters. We see minerals as foundations for industrialization, innovation, and sustainable development.

Our impact reaches across multiple dimensions:

For African Nations: We help governments capture greater value through strategic positioning, intelligent policy design, and enhanced negotiating leverage, creating fiscal space for investments in education, healthcare, and infrastructure.

For African Citizens: By maximizing and fairly distributing mineral wealth value, we contribute to quality jobs, entrepreneurial opportunities, and improved living standards across generations.

For Global Markets: We facilitate responsible, reliable supply chains for critical minerals by creating more equitable partnerships between African resource holders and global capital.

For the Planet: We foster sustainable approaches and circular economy principles that minimize ecological impacts while maximizing economic benefits.

Our work matters because today's decisions about Africa's critical minerals will shape continental development for decades to come. MOTIF Africa exists to ensure that future generations see this moment as the beginning of Africa's renaissance rather than another chapter in the resource curse.

This is our purpose. This is our impact. This is why our work matters.

SMBs lose 40% of potential leads due to slow response times and poor qualification processes. Marketing agencies, professional services, and B2B companies struggle with:

- Missing weekend/after-hours inquiries to faster competitors

- Inability to differentiate qualified prospects from tire-kickers

Tailyx AI delivers the first AI-native lead management platform that:
 Qualifies leads through natural conversation - No forms or questionnaires, just intelligent AI chat that feels human
 Scores prospects in real-time - Advanced BANT qualification with detailed reasoning
 Automates intelligent follow-up - Personalized nurture sequences enhanced with live market intelligence

What Makes Us Different:
We're the only platform combining conversational AI with real-time market intelligence. Our follow-up sequences don't just nurture—they provide strategic insights about industry trends, competitive landscape, and market timing that positions you as a trusted advisor.

Current Stage:
Building toward Q3 2025 launch. Currently in user interview phase with marketing agencies and professional services firms to validate product-market fit.

Target Market: Marketing agencies, professional services, and B2B SaaS companies with 10-100 employees generating 30+ leads monthly.

Name: Stack BD
Description:
In a world of AI-generated spam and generic sequences, a real human on a personalised video message stands out. Prospects actually respond because they can see you took some time to understand their situation.

But the research, script writing, recording, re-recording 10 times because of mistakes, upload and send can take up to an hour per video.

We're not replacing salespeople. We're making every rep capable of booking meetings like a top performer, without spending hours on research or sending thousands of ignored emails.

Stack BD is signal-based video prospecting that books meetings with a 10% booking rate.

Here's how it works:
→ Stack BD monitors buying signals (funding rounds, new hires, LinkedIn engagement, leadership posts) and identifies who's ready to buy
→ Connection requests go out to qualified prospects
→ When they accept, a personalised video script is generated in 30 seconds, referencing their specific signals and pain points
→ You record and send the video in 130 seconds using our teleprompter. It auto-delivers instantly.
→ Prospects enter a nurture sequence with follow-ups and high-value assets.
→ Meetings get booked. 10% meeting rate. From 2 days from signal to meeting.

Stack BD handles the research, timing and automation. You deliver the human connection.
